title: Senior Video Editor & Creative Partner (E-commerce Skincare Brand)
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing skincare e-commerce brand looking for a top-tier video editor who can create scroll-stopping ads that convert. This is NOT a “just follow instructions” role — we want a creative partner who brings ideas, challenges assumptions, and edits with a performance-first mindset.





Your Role

You’ll be responsible for editing and producing high-performing ad creatives for Meta Ads 
/Instagram), with the ability to adapt content for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and other platforms. You’ll work closely with our marketing team, using performance data and creative insights to iterate and improve results.



What You’ll Do

- Edit direct-response style video ads optimized for Meta Ads, with strong hooks, pacing, and clear CTAs.

- Adapt creatives to multiple formats/aspect ratios (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) and platform-specific best practices.

- Work with AI video tools such as Sora 2, Google Veo 3.1 , Higgsfield, Arcads, ElevenLabs — and explore new tools as they emerge for generating hyperrealistic AI UGC Videos and B-Rolls.

Integrate UGC content and skincare product footage into polished, scroll-stopping ads.

- Apply strong sound design, captions, motion graphics, and light color grading to elevate the creative.

- Use ad performance data to refine and optimize future creatives.

- Bring your own creative ideas and strategic input to every project.



What We’re Looking For

- Experience with the latest AI LLM's (mainly Sora 2 and Google Veo 3.1) for generating AI UGCs and B-Rolls

-  Proven experience editing ads for e-commerce/DTC brands (ideally in beauty or skincare)

- Strong portfolio of Meta Ads or direct-response video creatives (must provide links).

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

-  Understanding of performance metrics (CTR, watch time, ROAS) and how to edit for results.

- Skilled in motion graphics, typography, captions, and sound design.

- Experience with UGC integration and creator content is a plus.

- Fluent in English and comfortable collaborating via Slack/Zoom.

- Independent, proactive, and solutions-oriented — someone who feels like a partner, not just an editor.



Bonus Points If You Have

- Experience in scriptwriting or storyboarding ads.

- Familiarity with AI image generation tools (higgsflied, Sora etc.) for asset creation.

- Knowledge of the skincare/beauty space and its consumer psycho



Why Join Us

- Work on a brand with a clear mission and a loyal customer base.

- Opportunity to experiment with creative concepts and have your ideas tested in real campaigns.

- Be part of a data-driven, fast-moving, and creative environment.

- Bonus Payment: We like to reward you for high performing videos that you create with bonus payments

title: AI Video Editor
description:
Are you a fast, detail-oriented video editor who knows how to make AI-generated content look incredibly natural and engaging?



We are looking for a dedicated AI Video Editor to join our team. Your main tool will be HeyGen, and your daily mission will be to produce 16 high-quality, short-form AI avatar videos per day. You won’t just be clicking "generate" .You will be taking the raw AI output and polishing it in your preferred editing software by adding dynamic captions, B-roll, motion graphics, and sound design to make the final product feel human and ready for social media.



What You Will Do (Responsibilities)



High-Volume Production: Generate and edit 16 short-form videos (TikTok, IG Reels, YouTube Shorts) per day using HeyGen AI avatars and our provided scripts.



Refine & Polish: Clean up any AI artifacts, adjust pacing, fix awkward pauses, and ensure lip-syncing and expressions look as natural as possible.



Post-Production Magic: Add engaging captions, relevant B-roll, sound effects, background music, and smooth transitions to maximize viewer retention.



Workflow Management: Maintain a highly organized file system and consistently meet daily delivery deadlines.



Brand Consistency: Ensure all videos strictly align with our brand guidelines, colors, and visual style.



Who You Are (Requirements)



Proven Experience: Strong portfolio showcasing short-form video editing (preferably for TikTok/Reels/Shorts).



Tech Stack: Experience using HeyGen (or similar AI tools like Synthesia) AND proficiency in professional editing software (CapCut PC, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).



Speed & Efficiency: You have a streamlined workflow that allows you to comfortably handle 10 videos a day without sacrificing quality.



Attention to Detail: You have a sharp eye for catching unnatural AI movements and audio-video syncing issues.



Tech Requirements: A fast, reliable computer and a strong, stable internet connection (minimum 25-50 Mbps) to handle heavy video rendering and uploading.



Language: Excellent written and spoken English.





How to Apply

Attention to detail is critical for this role. To prove you have read this entire job description, please include the word "AVATAR" in the subject line of your application message.



In your application, please include:



Your updated resume.



A link to your portfolio (please specifically point out any short-form content or AI-generated videos you have edited).



A brief, 2-3 sentence explanation of your current editing workflow and how you plan to efficiently tackle 10 HeyGen videos a day.

title: Video Editor - Long Term
description:
Do not apply if you have never edited videos for a faceless YouTube channel.



I’m looking for one dedicated individual video editor for a long-term collaboration on a YouTube channel.



What You’ll Be Editing:

- Videos are 18–24 minutes long

- 2 - 3 videos per week.

- Voice-overs will be provided.

- You will be responsible for sourcing the footage.



Style & Expectations:

- The content is informational and story-driven.

- The most important part of this role is:

- Carefully listening to the voice-over

- Finding appropriate footage

- Placing the right footage at the right 
nts





Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



- You must be communicative and respond quickly

- You must be fluent in English

- You must be comfortable joining calls when needed

- You must be reliable and straightforward



Availability



- Intended to be a full-time collaboration 

- Long-term mindset is essential



Payment:



Pay: $3 per finished minute

average video length: 20 minutes

Uploads: 2 - 3 videos per week

TOTAL per month: 728$ (depending on how much videos)



If you’re an experienced YouTube editor who values quality, communication, and long-term work, I’d like to hear from you.



To apply, send me past work you have done.

title: tiktok video editor
description:
Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.



Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.











B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.









You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300-$400/month + bonuses for 3-4h a day MAX (this should be about 10-12 videos a day or more a day, takes me about 1 hours to edit 6 talking head videos) and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video:



Google drive: 

 





Please complete the following steps:

Broll:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head and overlays are the same thing basically so just make one video 

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

Message me a link to re-create video



Overlay

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Using the reference video and context, place overlays in the proper spots

Pay attention to overlay position and length

Make them big enough to see/read, but not so big they dominate the screen

Do not use any transitions, static overlays only

Message me a link to re-create video



Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “purple”

title: Real Estate Underwriter/Sales Analyst
description:
**Work From Anywhere | Join a Fast-Growing Real Estate Investment Firm

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Real Estate Underwriter to support our acquisitions team by evaluating deals, assessing risk, and delivering accurate financial and market analysis.



**About the Role

Position: Real Estate Underwriter

Location: Anywhere – 100% Remote

Work Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Pacific Time

(Occasional weekend work up to 4 hours)

Work Duration: 40 hours/week



In this role, you’ll focus on underwriting potential acquisitions, analyzing property financials, running comps, and evaluating market conditions to determine deal viability. You will play a key role in helping the team make data-driven investment decisions.



**Key Responsibilities

-Analyze and underwrite residential real estate deals (fix & flip, rental, or other investment strategies)

-Run comparable sales (comps) using MLS, Zillow, Redfin, and other platforms to support valuation

-Evaluate ARV (After Repair Value), rehab costs, and investment returns

-Build and maintain underwriting models and deal analysis spreadsheets

-Review property details, photos, and inspection reports to assess risk and opportunity

-Communicate with agents, contractors, and internal teams to validate assumptions and gather data

-Support acquisitions team with due diligence and deal evaluation

-Present clear, concise investment summaries and recommendations



**Qualifications

-Minimum 1 year of experience in real estate underwriting, acquisitions analysis, or a similar role (REQUIRED)

-Strong understanding of real estate investment concepts 

-Proven experience underwriting deals and running comps accurately

-Ability to assess risk and identify strong vs. weak investment opportunities

-Experience working with real estate agents and gathering market data

-High attention to detail with strong analytical and critical-thinking skills

-Strong written and verbal communication skills

-Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



**Technical Requirements

-Stable, high-speed internet connection

-Reliable laptop or desktop computer and smartphone

-Strong proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets (financial modeling, formulas, pivot tables)

-Experience with real estate tools (MLS, Zillow, Redfin, PropStream, or similar)



**Compensation

-$5-$7/hour (based on experience)

-Bi-weekly Pay



**Benefits Package (Applicable once the employee is regularized after the probationary period)

-10 days of paid time off (PTO)

-Maxicare health insurance coverage

-Sales bonus for every real estate property successfully sold

-SV anniversary gifts

-Birthday gift

-13th Month Pay, with the potential to earn two to three times the standard amount, depending on individual performance and overall company results



---------------------------------------

How to Apply - Please submit:

1. Resume (PDF or Word)

2. Internet speed test screenshot

3. Computer specs

4. Short video (Loom or YouTube) introducing yourself explaining your experience running comps and supporting real estate analysis





Ready to grow with us?

Apply now and join SV Ventures — where data-driven insights power smart decisions.

title: Creative Media Specialist
description:
APPLY HERE OR YOU WILL NOT BE CONTACTED: 







LOOKING TO START ASAP



We're hiring a Creative Media Specialist to produce high-quality images and videos for our agency and our clients. This is NOT a sales role, NOT a strategist role, and NOT a client-facing position.



This role is for someone who can take a brief or reference and turn it into polished, scroll-stopping creative — using both AI tools and hands-on editing skills.



What you'll be doing

Your work will be a mix of AI-generated content and manual editing/production, based on creative briefs and examples we provide.



Main responsibilities include:



Creating high-quality static images and short-form video ads for Meta 
/Instagram)

Using AI image and video generation tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, Pika, Leonardo, etc.) to produce professional creative assets



Editing and post-producing video content (cuts, transitions, text overlays, captions, sound design, color grading)

Taking raw footage, stock clips, or AI-generated clips and assembling them into polished final deliverables



Producing UGC-style and direct-response ad creatives for the home remodeling/contractor niche

Iterating quickly on creative variations (new hooks, thumbnails, aspect ratios) for ad testing



Organizing and delivering final assets with correct naming conventions and specs

Following creative SOPs and replicating winning formats across multiple client accounts



You will not be:



Talking to homeowners or clients



Writing ad strategy or media buying



Making creative decisions without direction (unless asked)



Must-haves (read carefully)



Strong portfolio showing image and video work (AI-generated and/or traditionally edited)



Proficiency with video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects)



Hands-on experience with at least 2-3 AI creative tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, DALL-E, Flux, Leonardo, etc.)



Eye for design, composition, and what looks good in a social media feed



Able to match a reference or style guide and replicate it consistently



Fast turnaround — comfortable producing multiple assets per day



Strong attention to detail on specs, formatting, and file delivery



Reliable, consistent, and organized



Willing to work U.S. business hours



Nice to have (not required)



Experience creating ads specifically for Meta 
/Instagram)



Familiarity with direct-response or performance marketing creative



Motion graphics or animation skills



ClickUp experience



Prior agency experience or experience producing creative at volume

title: Product Merchandise Data Coordinator
description:
IMPORTANT: We will only process applications of those who will apply through this link





Company and Vision



PlanetArt’s vision is to be the leading seller of personalized and make-on-demand products worldwide. We provide consumers with unmatched tools and content and an unparalleled end-to-end customer experience that result in high-quality, meaningful finished products and memorable celebrations of life events.



The company’s brands include the popular FreePrints and FreePrints Photobooks apps and the industry leading SimplytoImpress card and stationery site, as well as Personal Creations, CafePress and ISeeMe! Visit 
 to learn more about our brands.



We have more than 500 tea
mbers across multiple offices, primarily in Calabasas CA, San Diego CA, Woodridge IL, Minneapolis, MN and Pleasanton, CA. We also have tea
mbers in two company-owned offices in China, as well as in Europe.





Job Overview



PlanetArt is looking for a Product Merchandise Data Coordinator to support the company’s Merchandising department.

The successful candidate will be a detail-oriented professional with a strong understanding of e-commerce best practices, data management, analysis, inventory oversite and website functionality.



At PlanetArt, the Merchandising Associate plays a critical role in supporting the merchandising team through data management, pricing research, website updates and cross-functional coordination.

This role is highly analytical and detail-oriented, responsible for gathering and managing large datasets, coordinating cost and pricing requests, ensuring accuracy of product details and supporting website updates.

The ideal candidate will thrive in a fast -paced environment, is exceptionally organized and communicates effectively with both internal cross-functional teams and external partners.



This is a remote, work-from-home position.





What You’ll Do

Key Responsibilities



Data Management





Assist with gathering product data and costs from vendor documents and databases

Conduct detailed searches of vendor data to identify discrepancies. Proactively resolve inconsistencies – Product description, SKU, cost, specifications and missing information

Communicate with external vendors and request product detail, print location and cost information

Filter, sort and analyze complex reports to extract product information such as SKU details, cost changes and pricing tiers

Support reporting requests by pulling targeted product data to inform pricing, assortment planning and promotional strategy

Maintain documentation and version control for cost and product attribute updates



Costing & Pricing Requests



Create and manage cost and pricing request using our internal system in collaboration with cross-functional teams

Maintain documentation and version control for product cost and pricing updates

Communicate with cross-functional teams to assist with gathering COGS across product categories

Conduct competitive analysis on product pricing across product categories as we onboard new products



Inventory Analysis



Proactively audit the website on a weekly basis. Create reports on product status regarding out-of-stock items, color & size availability

Cross reference out of stock items against vendor websites and documents back in stock or discontinued information

Proactively communicate with internal teams and external partners to keep product inventory up to date on the website



Website Support



Assist with website updates: Learn internal tools and help to build new homepage zones, pills and other needed updates

Assist with product updates: Learn internal tools and help to update product information 

Conduct pre- and post- launch audits to confirm site and product accuracy



What You Should Have

Skills, Qualifications, and Requirements:



Associate or bachelor's degree in Merchandising, Business, or a related field.

1-3 years of experience in e-commerce, merchandising, buying or a similar role

Strong analytical skills with ability to manage large datasets

Strong understanding of online retail and e-commerce best practices

Strong proficiency with Excel, PLM and ERP systems are a plus!

Experience with Jira and project management systems is a plus!

Experience with Shopify or basic website build is a huge plus!

Experience with Adobe Creative Suite is a plus!

Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to adapt to changing priorities and work in a fast-paced environment





What You Can Expect

Working Conditions:



Position requires long-term and fully remote work scheduled from 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM US Pacific Time

Position requires regular, continuous use of computer.

Position requires regular sitting and standing.

Position requires regular interaction with tea
mbers through the following methods: phone, WebEx, Slack, or
.

Position requires time and screen tracking via Hubstaff





Work From Home Requirements:



Own computer (Windows 10 or higher or Mac, at least 8GB RAM and at least Intel i5, Ryzen 5 or M1 processor)

Reliable high-speed internet access

Noise-cancelling headset (if applicable)

Private, distraction-free environment (if applicable)



Pay Range:

Pay Rate: ?432 per hour (approximately ?75,000 per month)



Perks:

Paid Time Off

Paid US Holidays



IMPORTANT: We will only process applications of those who will apply through this link

title: I am looking for a video editor for for my Fitness YouTube Channel
description:
Hey!



I’m looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to create YouTube videos in the fitness niche (strength, mobility, longevity).



Videos are typically 12–15 minutes long, and I will provide:

Script

Voiceover



You do NOT need to research the topic.

Your job is to bring the video to life using:

Clips / B-roll

Images

Background music

Clean editing and pacing



Payment Structure (IMPORTANT):

$30–35 USD per English video (12–15 min)

+$10 USD per additional language



Each project usually includes:

English version

3 translated versions

Total per project: $60–65 USD



???? About Translations:

Translations are fairly easy work:

Script + voiceover are fully provided

Same video structure as English version

You mainly adjust timing and text to match the new voiceover



Style:

Clean and professional

Strong pacing (VERY important)

Engaging but not over-edited

Focus on retention

You will follow brand guidelines, but you’re encouraged to be creative within that style.



Workflow:

Around 1 video per week

Potential for more if things go well

Deadline: within 48 hours per video



I’m looking for someone who:

Has experience editing YouTube videos

Understands pacing and viewer retention

Is fluent in English

Is reliable and meets deadlines

Can source relevant clips and visuals



IMPORTANT (Read carefully):

If you’ve read this, write your favorite animal at the beginning of your application.



Also include:

1-2 examples of your best YouTube edits



Answer this question:

What makes a YouTube video engaging in the first 30 seconds?



Be ready to complete a 1-minute test edit (English only, no translations)



Example Video Style: 



Looking forward to working with you long-term if it’s a good fit.

title: Experienced AI UGC content creator
description:
We are looking for a creative and experienced UGC AI Content Creator with a strong understanding of organic and paid marketing. You love creating authentic and impactful AI-generated UGC content, with attention to detail, simplicity, consistency, and high quality.



Job Description:

You will use tools such as Veo 3.1, Kling 2.6/3.0 (video generation), Canva, CapCut, and ElevenLabs to create content. Hands-on experience with these tools is a must.



Your responsibilities:

• Create high-quality visuals using Veo 3.1 and Kling 3.0

• Edit short and engaging videos, ready to be published

• Create AI-generated voiceovers using ElevenLabs

• Deliver polished, publish-ready content from A to Z



What we're looking for:

• Hands-on experience with the tools mentioned above

• Creativity, visual sense, and storytelling ability

• Available Monday to Sunday

• Reliable and able to create content that stands out

• Fast and stable internet connection



What we offer:

We are a family-run team that works with good energy and trust. We are looking for someone to grow with us on the long term — not just for a one-off project. People who are truly invested are rewarded: performance-based bonuses and profit-sharing bonuses based on results. If you grow with us, we grow with you.



To apply, please send us your portfolio by message.

Thank you for your interest.

title: Operations Specialist (Dispatch & Coordination)
description:
We’re looking for an  Operations Specialist (Dispatch & Coordination) to support a fast-growing operations and logistics platform that powers real-world & on the ground operations (e.g., delivery robots, on-demand moving boxes, and brand events) across the United States.



In this role, you’ll help coordinate staffing, support workers, and keep daily operations running smoothly. You’ll also monitor ongoing tasks, respond to issues, and make sure updates are shared with the team.



This role is a good fit for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable solving problems in a fast-moving environment.



Responsibilities

- Support daily operations by coordinating staffing needs, schedules, and operational tasks.

- Fill shifts in real time by communicating with workers and responding to last-minute staffing requests.

- Help workers with questions and make sure they have the information they need to complete their assignments.

- Communicate with clients and internal teams to keep everyone updated on staffing and operations.

- Monitor ongoing operations and flag issues early so they can be resolved quickly.

- Help coordinate day-to-day operational activities when needed (schedules, on-ground tasks, etc.)

- Track updates, schedules, and tasks in internal systems.

- Assist with onboarding and documentation.

- Work with the operations team to improve workflows and processes.

- Create or update SOPs and checklists to help keep operations organized.

- Support operations during busy periods, including weekends when needed.



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience in operations support, staffing coordination, dispatch, customer support, or similar roles.

- 1+ year WFH experience working directly with US-based clients.

- Team Lead or Subject Matter Expert experience preferred.

- Experience in startups or fast-growing companies is a plus.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

- Comfortable handling multiple tasks at the same time.

- Able to stay calm, solve problems, and quickly learn new tools and processes in a fast-moving environment.

- Experience using tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, Airtable, Notion, or similar systems.

- Self-starter who asks questions, takes ownership, and looks for ways to improve processes.

- Experience in staffing platforms, marketplaces, logistics coordination, or operations support is a plus.

- Available to work weekends when needed.

- Able to work on a graveyard shift aligned with US business hours.

- Must have a stable internet connection and a reliable work-from-home setup. 



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- Opportunity to grow with a scaling operations business and take on increasing responsibility



When applying, send your resume link, explain why you're a good fit. Also copy and paste this Job ID: rec3k2P8qsKXsE0Ya into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job ID:rec3k2P8qsKXsE0Ya!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Creative Strategist DTC
description:
We’re looking for an experienced DTC Creative Strategist. You will sit at the intersection of data-driven insights and bold creative execution.



Responsibilities:



- Creative Research: Mine reviews, competitor ads, and community trends to uncover high-performing angles and emotional triggers.



- Creative Briefing: Deliver data-backed briefs to editors and UGC creators that define the "why" behind the "what."



- Testing Frameworks: Design and manage a systematic approach to testing hooks, formats, and offers.



- Performance Analysis: Analyze ad data to diagnose what’s winning and identify the "why" behind the numbers.



- KPI Management: Track and optimize for Hook Rate, Thumb-Stop Rate, CTR, and Hold Rate.



- Iteration & Scaling: Rapidly remix winning concepts and refresh formats to prevent creative fatigue.



- Production Oversight: Manage editors and creators to ensure final assets meet brand standards and strategic goals.



Requirements:



- English Fluency: Professional-level written and spoken English.

title: Business Executive Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a family business in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA. We run a real estate investment business. We need a reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive virtual assistant to support our business operations and occasionally manage our household logistics.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with us and become indispensable — not a short-term gig. We are looking for someone who takes initiative, follows through without reminders, and brings solutions instead of problems.

Hours & Pay



- Targeting 40 hours/week (8 hours/day, Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

- Will start with reduced hours as you prove yourself we will increase you to 40 hours.

- $6–7/hr USD

- Paid holidays + PTO after 90 days



What You Will Do



Business Operations:



- Daily CRM hygiene and lead tracking (ForeFront and REsimpli)

-
 triage and management across multiple inboxes

- Weekly KPI scorecard updates

- Contractor and vendor coordination for active renovation projects

- Transaction coordinator support on active wholesale deals

- Social media monitoring and scheduling

- QuickBooks mileage and expense logging

- Monthly property manager statement review

- Research and admin support as needed



Personal & Household:



- Manage family calendar including appointments, reminders, drive time blocks, and scheduling conflicts

- Track medical and HSA expenses in Google Sheets and organize receipts in Google Drive

- Research and book restaurants, gifts, and appointments

- Make calls to US businesses on our behalf



Requirements



- 2+ years VA or executive assistant experience — personal/household experience strongly preferred

- Strong written and spoken English — must be comfortable on calls with US businesses and vendors

- Proficient with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Drive)

- Experience with CRM systems a plus (ForeFront, REsimpli, or similar)

- Accounting or bookkeeping background a strong plus

- Reliable high-speed internet — minimum 25 Mbps with ethernet connection capability. This is a hard requirement.

- Quiet, professional workspace

- Trustworthy with personal, financial, and family information



Who You Are



- You notice what needs to be done before being asked

- You bring solutions, not just problems

- You follow through on every commitment without reminders

- You communicate proactively — if something is taking longer than expected, you say so before it becomes a problem

- You are organized, fast-learning, and genuinely enjoy making someone's life easier

- You want to be with us for 2+ years and grow as the business grows



How to Apply



Do NOT reply here. Fill out our application form:





The form takes 20–30 minutes and includes a short scenario task and a short video recording. Only applications submitted through the form will be considered.



Please answer this question in your application: Describe a specific time you identified a problem or task your employer didn't ask you about and handled it independently. What did you do and what was the outcome?

title: Full-Cycle Video Producer (Canva/CapCut/Premiere) – HVAC/Roofing FULL-TIME 9-5 EST
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Video Producer to manage end-to-end short-form video creation for HVAC clients.

This role goes beyond basic editing — we need someone who can research, script, source footage, and produce polished final videos with AI voiceovers and dynamic captions.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



QUALITY & PAYMENT POLICY:

-Accuracy Standard: You are expected to deliver a high-quality first draft. Revisions required due to failure to follow instructions (incorrect phone number, wrong caption color, mispronounced terms, missing assets, etc.) must be corrected promptly.

-Billable Work: Additional payment will only be provided if the client changes the original scope or script after the first approved version.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Expert-level CapCut or Premiere Pro skills.

-Strong Canva experience.

-Pro-level familiarity with ElevenLabs including aliases, phonetic spelling, and pronunciation control.

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



HOW TO APPLY:

-Please start your proposal with "HVAC YELLOW" to verify you have read the full brief. 

-Provide 2–3 samples of your best short-form video work featuring dynamic captions and AI voiceovers.

-IF do not have portfolio showcasing work in our niche or prior experience creating HVAC/Plumbing or Roofing video ads, we’d like you to complete a short test project so we can properly evaluate your design skills, creativity, ability to follow directions, and understanding of ad structure.

-ASK: SEND ME TEST

- DO NOT submit your resume or any Figma or websites files as these are not considered as proof of your qualifications. SEND ONLY google drive or canva links to your previous work.

title: Video Editor
description:
About QVM Digital Marketing

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. is a remote-first digital marketing agency based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, serving businesses and non-profits across Canada. We help our clients grow through SEO, website design and development, social media, content creation, and business sales strategies. We're a lean, driven team that takes pride in doing great work for great clients.



Role Overview

We're looking for a skilled and creative Part-Time Video Editor to join the QVM team. In this role, you'll be responsible for editing short-form and long-form video content for QVM's own brand and for our clients. This includes social media reels, promotional videos, testimonial clips, ad creatives, and educational content.



You'll work closely with our content team and report directly to the CEO. This is a flexible, remote role ideal for someone who is self-motivated, detail-oriented, and passionate about creating video content that actually converts.



Key Responsibilities

Edit raw video footage into polished, brand-aligned content for social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

Produce short-form content such as Reels, Stories, and TikToks with captions, transitions, and on-brand visual elements

Create and edit promotional and ad creative videos for paid ad campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads)

Add motion graphics, lower thirds, subtitles, and callouts as needed

Edit on-camera spokesperson videos in a clean, direct, and engaging style

Assist with video content for client projects as assigned

Organize and maintain video asset files in a shared folder system

Deliver files in the correct formats and specs for each platform

Receive feedback and revisions professionally and turn them around within agreed timelines

Stay current on social media video trends, editing styles, and platform algorithm preferences



Qualifications

2+ years of video editing experience, professional or freelance

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or similar editing software

Strong understanding of short-form video content for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

Experience editing talking-head or on-camera spokesperson content

Basic motion graphics and text animation skills (Adobe After Effects or built-in platform tools)

Strong eye for visual storytelling, pacing, and brand consistency

Reliable internet connection and a professional remote work setup

Ability to meet deadlines with minimal supervision

Strong communication skills; comfortable giving and receiving feedback



Nice to Have

Experience editing video ads for trades, contractors, or professional services

Familiarity with direct-response video style and ad creative best practices

Basic colour grading and audio mixing skills

Experience working within a digital marketing or creative agency

Portfolio of client or brand video work



What We Offer

Flexible part-time hours -- you manage your own schedule

Fully remote, work-from-anywhere setup

Collaborative, supportive team culture

Opportunity to grow your portfolio across multiple industries

Potential to grow into a full-time role as the agency scales

title: B2B Sales VA
description:
We are a U.S.-based wholesale distribution business selling office and janitorial supplies to businesses across the state of Florida. With access to 500+ brands, we offer competitive bulk pricing that often beats major suppliers like Staples, Office Depot, and Amazon.



The Sales Virtual Assistant is responsible for supporting business growth through lead generation, outreach, and customer acquisition. This role focuses on identifying prospective clients, engaging decision-makers, and promoting wholesale office and janitorial supply solutions.



The position involves cold calling,
 outreach, follow-up, and closing support to maintain a consistent pipeline of qualified opportunities. The Sales Virtual Assistant plays a critical role in driving revenue while maintaining organized communication and delivering a high standard of professionalism.



Responsibilities:

 - Research and build lists of potential business customers

 - Reach out via cold calling,
, and messaging

 - Pitch our pricing and product offerings clearly

 - Handle objections and follow up with prospects

 - Keep track of leads and conversations

 - Work towards closing deals or setting up qualified buyers



What You’ll Be Selling

You will be offering office and janitorial supplies that every business already uses, such as:

 - Cleaning products

-  Paper goods

 - Office supplies

-  Breakroom supplies



What We’re Looking For

- Strong English communication (spoken & written)

- Experience in B2B Sales 

- Confident speaking with U.S. businesses

- Sales, cold calling, or lead generation experience preferred

- Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent

- Self-motivated and goal-driven



Compensation will be discussed upon interviewing



IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN THIS POSITION, PLEASE INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING IN YOUR APPLICATION



What is your previous experience in B2B Sales? Please explain in detail.



What is your favorite activity outside of work, and why?

title: Short Term Rental Property Manager
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our property management operations. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in client and tenant management, maintenance coordination, and administrative tasks. Experience with short-term rentals is required, and mid-term and co-living rental experience is strongly preferred. Knowledge of property management software is required, especially in the short term rental space. 



This is a remote that requires 6 to 8 hours of work per day, with an opportunity for more pay, time and responsibilities depending on performance. We are aggressively looking to expand the business so there is opportunity for growth within the first year and beyond. This company is also heavily incentive-based, with multiple bonus programs based on project or task completion.



Key Responsibilities:

Guest Management:

- Handle tenant inquiries, lease agreements, and communication regarding property-related issues.

- Intimate knowledge of systems and processes relevant to short term rental management

- Track tenant payments, issues, and documentation.

- Assist with tenant screening, move-in/move-out processes, and lease renewals.

- Proactively anticipating needs of tenants and guests with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Maintenance Management:

- Coordinate maintenance and repair requests, ensuring timely resolution of issues.

- Work with cleaners, vendors, and maintenance teams to ensure efficient service delivery.

- Maintain records of work orders and repairs.



Client Management:

- Maintain regular communication with property owners and potential clients.

- Provide updates on property performance, tenant issues, and upcoming lease renewals.

- Assist in the onboarding of new clients and tenants, ensuring smooth transitions and client satisfaction.

- Proactively anticipating needs of clients with a service and hospitality-driven mindset



Bookkeeping & Accounting (strongly preferred, but not required):

- Assist with rent collection, invoicing, and managing payments.

- Maintain financial records and assist in reconciling accounts as needed.

- Track expenses and provide regular updates to management regarding the financial status of properties.



General Administrative Tasks:

- Expert knowledge of AI tools strongly preferred

- Support and maintain systems and processes specific to short-term rental and mid-term rental management, including property management software, Airbnb, Furnished Finder and other platforms.

- Manage and organize documents, contracts, and property records.

- Schedule appointments and coordinate virtual property showings or inspections.

- Assist in drafting and responding to
s, phone calls, and other correspondence as needed.



Software Management:

- Utilize property management software tools to streamline operations and keep records up to date.



Digital Marketing (Preferred but Not Required):

- Support social media marketing efforts to build the brand, attract potential tenants and promote properties.

- Assist in crafting content and updating social media channels as needed.



Qualifications:

Experience:

- Proven experience in STR property management or real estate support roles required.

- Strong knowledge of property management software tools (e.g., GHL, 
, RentRedi, Hospitable, etc.) is strongly preferred.

- Experience in short-term, mid-term and co-living rentals is strongly preferred



Skills:

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills (strong English proficiency required).

- Technically savvy and comfortable learning and using new software tools.

- Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

- Ability to proactively identify challenges and find effective solutions.



Soft Skills:

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented.

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks without direct supervision.

- Ability to ask questions for guidance when necessary.

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think critically.

- High level of professionalism and strong interpersonal skills.



Hours:



6 to 8 hours per day, with flexibility in scheduling based on needs. Opportunity to increase pay and time depending on performance.



Compensation:

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Bonus commissions available for every successful client acquisition, tenant placement and other bonus incentives



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and a self-recorded video link answering the following questions. If you don't have experience for a particular answer, that's fine. Simply move on to the next question.



Describe one underperforming short-term rental you managed. What were the key metrics you reviewed, what changes did you make, and what were the results in the following weeks/months?



A guest messages at 9:45 PM saying the home isn’t clean. What is your immediate response, and what specific steps do you take in the next hour?



Share a time you sensed a guest was unhappy before they directly complained. What were the signs, and how did you handle it?



An owner says occupancy is down 12% in the last 2 months and blames management. How do you respond, and what data do you reference?



What is one system or process you built or significantly improved in an STR operation? What was the problem, what did you change, and what improved?



What PMS, channel managers, and pricing tools have you used? How do you set up a new property from start to fully operational inside a PMS?



What operational differences exist between short-term rentals and midterm or rent-by-the-room models? What changes in screening, policies, or systems?



If managing 20 properties, how do you structure your daily and weekly workflow to prevent dropped tasks?



If bookings are slow 21 days out, what steps do you take before lowering price?



Describe a situation where you escalated an issue to an owner. Why did you escalate instead of resolving it yourself?



What makes you stand out from other interested candidates?



Ask any questions you have about the role?

title: Home Care Marketing & Operations Coordinator
description:

title: Senior Automation & CRM Specialist (GoHighLevel / HubSpot / Airtable / Basecamp)
description:
I run an automation agency building end-to-end systems for service-based businesses.



This role is for someone who can design and build real systems, not just execute tasks.



Core tech stack



You must have strong, hands-on experience with:



* GoHighLevel (advanced workflows, triggers, conditions, pipelines)

* HubSpot (CRM structure, lifecycle stages, workflows)

* Airtable (data structuring and automation support)

* Basecamp (project delivery and client collaboration)



What you’ll be doing



* Designing and building automation systems for client accounts

* Structuring CRMs, pipelines, and lifecycle workflows

* Building lead capture, quoting, and follow-up systems

* Creating multi-step workflows with conditional logic

* Troubleshooting broken or inefficient automations



Internal systems & project delivery (major part of the role):



* Setting up and managing projects inside Basecamp

* Rolling out Basecamp as our core project delivery system

* Structuring client projects, onboarding, and delivery workflows

* Integrating Basecamp into our internal GoHighLevel systems

* Improving our internal systems and customer experience end-to-end



This is not just a build role. You will help design how the business operates internally.



What I’m looking for



You must:



* Have built real client systems end-to-end

* Be confident designing workflows before building them

* Understand automation logic deeply (not just basic sequences)

* Have experience managing or structuring projects (Basecamp or similar)

* Be able to work independently and think in systems



This is NOT a junior role



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly:



* social media

* Canva

* basic
 campaigns

* general VA work



Application questions (required)



Question 1



Describe a system you have personally built using GoHighLevel and at least one other tool (HubSpot, Airtable, or similar).



Include:



1. The business problem

2. How you structured the system (brief but clear steps)

3. The most complex part of the automation logic

4. How you handled edge cases (e.g. early conversion, no response, duplicate triggers)



Question 2 (important)*



A lead enters a workflow and receives a 5-step follow-up sequence.



On day 2, they convert (book or purchase), but they continue receiving the remaining messages.



Explain exactly how you would fix this inside GoHighLevel.



Be specific about:



* what triggers, conditions, or workflow changes you would use

* how you would prevent this happening again across the system



Question 3



You are setting up Basecamp as the main project delivery tool for an automation agency.



How would you structure:



* a new client onboarding project

* task organisation

* communication between internal team and client



Applications that are vague or theoretical will not be reviewed.



Bonus



* Experience with quoting systems or calculators

* API / webhook integrations

* AI within workflows



If you’re someone who takes ownership, builds clean systems, and understands how automation drives real business outcomes, apply below.

Smith Lake Farm Tours is looking for a highly organized, reliable, and detail-oriented bookkeeper and administrator to support financial administration, bookkeeping, and operational coordination for our growing tourism and accommodation business.

This role is ideal for someone who is experienced with both Sage and enjoys working with numbers, financial systems, and organized processes, while also helping keep daily operations running smoothly.

While the role requires the ability to work independently and manage responsibilities during off-peak hours, you will also work directly with our leadership team and will have the opportunity to grow into a larger bookkeeping/administrative or management role as the business expands. Performance reviews with wage increases quarterly. Time tracking software will be utilized to assist reviews.

15 - 20 hours per week

Because this shift supports morning operational administration, consistent availability and reliability are essential.

mbers

mbers.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

This position is best suited for someone who:

To Apply

title: Client Acquisition, SEO & Lead Generation Specialist (Remote)
description:
About GlowMD

GlowMD is a luxury medical spa based in Texas specializing in wellness, aesthetics, IV hydration, and medical weight loss treatments. Our focus is delivering exceptional patient experiences while growing through high-quality, targeted digital marketing.



We are looking for a results-driven Google Ads & Lead Generation Specialist who understands how to generate qualified leads that convert into paying clients.



Role Overview

This is a performance-driven role focused on revenue growth. The ideal candidate understands SEO, Google Ads, sales psychology, and lead generation strategies that bring in qualified leads and convert them into booked services.

You will be responsible for improving online visibility, generating traffic, and turning that traffic into real patients.



Primary Objective

• Generate qualified leads that convert into completed paid services for GlowMD.



Responsibilities

• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns

• Develop and execute SEO strategies to increase organic traffic

• Perform keyword research and competitor analysis

• Optimize campaigns and pages for cost per lead and conversions

• Improve landing pages and website conversion rates

• Set up and monitor conversion tracking

• Implement retargeting campaigns

• Analyze marketing data and continuously improve performance

• Develop strategies to turn website traffic into booked services



Requirements

• Proven experience in SEO and Google Ads

• Strong understanding of lead generation and online sales funnels

• Experience increasing website traffic and conversions

• Ability to analyze data and optimize campaigns

• Knowledge of conversion optimization and landing pages

• Strong communication and strategic thinking

• Experience in healthcare, wellness, aesthetics, or local service marketing is a plus



Compensation

Base Pay:

• $7 per hour



Phase 1 Bonus:

• $15 per completed paid service generated from your campaigns

• Monthly bonus cap: $1,000



Upgrade Opportunity (After 3 Months of Hitting Cap):

•  $7/hour base

• $10 per completed service

• + 3% revenue after the first 50 services



Trial Period:

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 5-day paid trial to evaluate campaign strategy, performance mindset, and communication.



KPIs

• Increased organic website traffic

• Decreasing cost per lead

• Increasing lead-to-client conversion rates

• Positive ROI from marketing campaigns

• Consistent qualified lead generation



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your SEO and Google Ads experience

• Examples of lead generation results

• Case studies or screenshots of campaign performance

• A short explanation of your strategy to generate leads for a medical spa



We are looking for someone who understands how to turn traffic into real paying clients.

title: Senior Laravel + Vue 3 Engineer – ERP Migration & Accounting Validation (Full-Time Remote)
description:
About the Project



We are rebuilding our mature legacy ERP system (PowerBuilder client-server) as a modern SaaS application using Laravel and Vue 3.



The system includes:



• Real Estate Management

• Full Accounting Module (Chart of Accounts, Cost Centers, Subledger, General Ledger)

• Financial Reports (Trial Balance, Income Statement, Balance Sheet)

• Contract Management

• Lease & Payment Transactions

• Multi-branch handling

• Role-based permissions



The legacy system is fully operational and will serve as the reference system for validation and reconciliation.



This is not a startup MVP.

This is a modernization and stabilization role for a mature ERP system.



Role Overview



We are looking for a strong full-stack engineer who can:



• Audit and understand an existing Laravel + Vue 3 codebase

• Validate SaaS outputs against a legacy ERP system

• Ensure accounting logic and financial reports reconcile correctly

• Identify mismatches and root causes

• Improve transaction posting integrity

• Review and optimize database structure

• Enhance UI consistency and professional polish

• Implement structured regression testing

• Deliver stable, production-grade releases



This role requires strong analytical thinking and discipline — not just feature development.



Required Experience



• 5+ years Laravel experience

• 3+ years Vue.js experience (Vue 3 preferred)

• Experience working on production SaaS systems

• Strong REST API knowledge

• Strong MySQL database design knowledge

• Experience taking over and improving existing codebases

• Experience with Git workflows



Strongly Preferred



• Experience working on ERP, accounting, financial, or transaction-based systems

• Understanding of double-entry accounting concepts

• Experience validating financial reports

• Experience optimizing legacy or mature codebases



Compensation



• $1,200 USD per month

• Full-time (40 hours per week)

• Long-term, stable product role



Application Requirement 



Our SaaS system is a rebuild of an existing legacy ERP that includes a full accounting module.



To proceed with your application, please answer the following:



If you were assigned to validate that our SaaS system produces identical financial outputs (Trial Balance, Income Statement, Balance Sheet) as the legacy system, how would you structure your validation approach?



Please briefly describe:



• How you would prepare test data

• How you would compare reports between systems

• How you would detect and log mismatches

• How you would handle rounding or posting differences

• How you would prevent regression issues after fixes



Structured answers are preferred.

title: Senior Marketing Strategist (Demand Generation & Growth)
description:
Part Time with option to move to full time after initial 3 months



I run an automation agency called Designed For Results



We help service-based businesses generate more leads, improve conversion, and scale through automation, CRM systems, and workflow optimisation.



I’m now looking for someone to own and drive marketing for the business.



This is not a content role.



This is a commercial, strategy-led role focused on generating enquiries and building authority.



What you’ll be responsible for



You will own and execute the marketing strategy across:



* Organic content (social media, blogs, newsletters)

* Paid campaigns (where appropriate)

* Funnel strategy and optimisation

* Community building and engagement

* SEO and long-term inbound growth

* Website optimisation (Squarespace) to improve conversion



This includes reviewing and improving:



* messaging and positioning

* page structure and user journey

* calls to action and conversion points



Your goal is simple:



Generate consistent, qualified enquiries and position the business as a leader in its space.



About the business



Designed For Results is a business efficiency and automation agency.  



We:



* design and build custom systems in tools like GoHighLevel, Airtable and HubSpot

* automate lead capture, follow-up and internal workflows

* help businesses save time and increase revenue through better systems



Most of our clients are service-based businesses (trades, construction, and similar industries).



What I’m looking for



You must:



* Think commercially, not just creatively

* Understand how to turn messaging into enquiries

* Be able to identify and articulate strong USPs

* Know how to write hooks that stop attention and drive action

* Understand funnels and how traffic converts (not just traffic generation)

* Be confident reviewing and improving website copy and structure for conversion

* Be able to plan and execute a strategy, not just post content



This is NOT a junior role



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly:



* posting on social media

* Canva design

* following content calendars without strategy

* basic VA or admin marketing tasks



What success looks like



* Consistent inbound enquiries

* Growth in the right audience (not vanity followers)

* Clear positioning in the market

* A website that converts visitors into leads

* Content that drives action, not just engagement



Application questions (required)



Question 1



Based on what you’ve read above, what would be the first 3 things you would do to generate enquiries for this business?



Be specific.



Question 2



Describe a campaign, funnel, or strategy you have personally worked on that generated leads or revenue.



Include:



* the goal

* what you did

* what worked (and what didn’t)

* the outcome



Question 3 (important)



If a website is getting traffic but not converting into enquiries:



* what are the most likely reasons

* how would you diagnose the issue

* what would you change first



Applications that are vague, generic, or focused only on content creation will not be considered.



Bonus



* Experience marketing agencies or service-based businesses

* Strong experience combining organic and paid channels

* Experience improving website conversion rates



If you’re someone who understands how to turn attention into enquiries and can own marketing end-to-end, I’d love to hear from you.



Niki

Designed For Results

Editing Style

- Natural

Workflow Expectations

title: Senior Software Engineer Architect
description:
???? Senior AI / Machine Learning Engineer (Computer Vision + LLM Systems)

Company: Quicklotz (US-based, high-growth tech + logistics)

Role Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Compensation: Competitive + performance bonuses



???? About the Role:

We are building AI-powered infrastructure to automate large-scale logistics, refurbishment, and resale operations.

This includes:

Computer vision systems for product identification + grading

LLM-powered pipelines for listing generation, classification, and automation

Data pipelines for real-time pricing + market intelligence

Internal AI tools integrated into warehouse workflows

You will work directly with the CTO to design and deploy real-world AI systems at scale.



?? Core Tech + Focus Areas:

Languages: Python, TypeScript

AI/ML: PyTorch, TensorFlow (preferred PyTorch)

LLMs: OpenAI, Claude, local/open-source models

Computer Vision: OpenCV, YOLO, object detection pipelines

Model Handling: weights, checkpoints, fine-tuning, inference optimization

Data: PostgreSQL, vector databases (optional)

Infra: Docker, GPU environments, VPS/cloud



???? Responsibilities:

Build and deploy computer vision models (object detection, classification)

Fine-tune and optimize ML/LLM models for production use

Work with model weights, checkpoints, and training pipelines

Develop AI-driven automation systems (classification, pricing, listing generation)

Design data pipelines for training + inference

Optimize performance for real-time or batch processing



? Requirements:

Strong experience with Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch preferred)

Experience with computer vision (YOLO, OpenCV, etc.)

Understanding of:

Model weights / checkpoints

Fine-tuning workflows

Training vs inference pipelines

Experience deploying models into production environments

Ability to work independently and solve complex problems



???? Bonus (High Value):

Experience with LLM fine-tuning / prompt pipelines

Experience with multi-modal systems (vision + LLM)

Experience with dataset labeling / annotation pipelines

Experience with GPU optimization (CUDA, batching, inference speed)

Experience with anti-bot scraping or large-scale data ingestion



???? Do NOT Apply If:

You’ve only used ChatGPT APIs without understanding models

You cannot explain how training, fine-tuning, or inference works

You don’t have hands-on ML project experience



???? What You Get:

Work on real AI systems tied to $25M+ operations

Direct access to leadership + fast execution environment

Ownership of core AI infrastructure

Long-term growth + performance incentives



???? How to Apply:

Send:

GitHub / portfolio (REQUIRED)

2–3 AI/ML projects (with details on what you built)

Short Loom (2–3 mins):

Explain a model you’ve worked on

How you handled training / fine-tuning

A challenge you solved

Subject Line: AI Engineer Application – [Your Name]



???? Screening Question (MANDATORY)

Include this in your application:

Explain the difference between training, fine-tuning, and inference.

Also explain what “model weights” are in simple terms.



???? Final Note:

We are not looking for prompt engineers.

We are looking for engineers who understand models, data, and systems.

title: Freelance Graphic and Video designer for Social Media Content.
description:

Video 

Video 

Video 

Image 

Image

Thank you for reading!

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: OPERATIONS MANAGER- digital platforms in production
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a key hire. You will be the operational backbone of a group of six digital platforms — all built and owned by one founder. Your job is to make sure everything is moving, everyone knows what they're doing, and nothing falls through the cracks.

You don't need to be a developer or a designer. But you do need to understand how websites work, what it takes to get them ranking on Google, and how to manage a small remote team without being micromanaged yourself.

You will report directly to the CEO and be the first point of contact for all staff, contractors, and VA hires across the portfolio.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

This is not a data entry position. It is not a junior VA role. It is not an easy ride.

You are stepping into the operational lead position of a growing multi-platform business. The CEO is hands-on but moves fast — and he needs someone who can keep up, think ahead, and take real ownership of the day-to-day without being led by the hand.

If that sounds like the kind of work you want to be doing, this role has a lot to offer.

 



SALARY AND GROWTH

Starting salary: USD $900 per month, 3 month probation and if successful $1200 per month full-time 

This is not a fixed ceiling. Salary is reviewed as the business hits defined revenue milestones — and the team's output is what drives those milestones. The faster the platforms grow, the sooner that review happens.

We are building something with a long runway. The person in this role is expected to still be here in Year 3 — with a title, a salary, and a team that reflects everything they helped build.

 



 WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Someone who is mature and has managed remote staff or freelancers before and knows how to keep people accountable without creating conflict

• Comfortable with digital tools — Google Workspace, project management platforms, basic analytics

• Understands SEO well enough to review a VA's work and know if it's good or not

• Clear written communicator —
s and updates should be direct and professional, not long-winded

• Organised and self-directed — you don't need to be told twice, and you don't wait to be chased

• Honest about problems — you flag issues early, not after they've compounded

• Based in the Philippines or Southeast Asia — and available during reasonable overlap hours with UAE time (GMT+4)

 

WHAT YOU WILL OVERSEE

You are responsible for the day-to-day running of all six platforms. That includes:

• Making sure VA staff are completing their tasks on time and to the right standard

• Tracking what's live, what's in progress, and what's blocked — and reporting that to the CEO daily

• Managing contractors on Upwork: briefing them, checking deliverables, and releasing payment only when work passes a checklist

• Keeping the team's shared workspace (Notion) up to date so everything is organised and visible

• Setting up and maintaining the tech tools the business runs on —
 accounts, CRM, analytics, and reporting dashboards

• Identifying when something isn't working and flagging it before it becomes a problem

 



SEO AND WEBSITE KNOW-HOW

You don't need to write code. But you do need to understand what makes a website perform — and be able to have an informed conversation about it.

Specifically, you should be comfortable with:

• What on-page SEO means and why it matters — page titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal links

• How Google Search Console and Google Analytics work — reading basic traffic reports and identifying what's growing and what isn't

• What a website rollout involves — domain setup, DNS, hosting, going live — enough to manage a developer and know when something is wrong

• What a good-quality website looks like from a business perspective — clean layout, clear calls to action, fast loading, mobile-friendly

• How to brief a developer or VA on a web task clearly, without needing to write the code yourself

 



OUTREACH RESPONSIBILITIES

Alongside managing staff, you will handle certain outreach tasks yourself — particularly in the early months before the team is fully built out.

This includes:

• Following up with API suppliers and business partners on behalf of the CEO — using pre-approved
 templates

• Submitting the business to directories, travel platforms, and relevant industry listings

• Coordinating affiliate programme applications — tracking status, following up, and confirming live links

• Supporting the VA team on influencer and supplier outreach by reviewing their work and maintaining quality standards

You are not expected to write original content or build partnerships independently. The CEO handles all commercial negotiations. Your role is to execute, track, and report.

title: Job Title: Sales and Solutions Specialist – phone sales, online sales, customer service
description:
Sales and Solutions Specialists for Willis Lawn Services



About the Role

Are you a people person who loves solving puzzles? We are looking for a Sales & Solutions Specialist to join our team in 2026. This isn't just about "closing deals"—it’s about listening to our neighbors and providing real solutions that make their lives easier. You will be the first point of contact for our sales leads, ensuring they feel heard and valued from the very first hello!

Our company helps homeowners create beautiful yards by providing effective solutions for lawn and insect problems. While prior knowledge of our specific services isn't required, we are looking for candidates who are eager to learn the details of what we do!



What You’ll Do

- Engage with Leads: This role is primarily phone-based. You will spend your day talking directly to interested leads, acting as the friendly, professional voice of our company.

- Answer In-Depth Questions: Our customers are looking for experts. You will be expected to answer a high volume of questions with patience, clarity, and a "help-first" attitude.

- Precision Quoting: Use modern online mapping and measurement tools to accurately assess customer properties and generate custom quotes.

- Consultative Selling: Guide interested leads through our process and handle the signup for those ready to hire our team.

- Build Trust: Ensure every interaction reinforces our commitment to showing customers that they truly matter to us.



What We’re Looking For

 - Strong English Proficiency: Because you will be the primary point of contact for our sales leads, you must have excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Exceptional Communicators: You can turn a phone call into a relationship and explain services clearly.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using CRM systems to manage your workflow, ready to learn how to measure properties online for quotes.

- Solution-Oriented: You don't just sell; you listen and recommend what is best for the customer’s specific situation.

- Detail-Oriented: Accurate measurements lead to accurate quotes—you take pride in getting the details right.



This job will be a graveyard shift position. We need someone to work 9am to 5:30pm Central Standard Time (CST) Monday through Friday, which is 11pm to 7:30am Philippine Standard Time (PST) Tuesday through Saturday  (10pm to 6:30am PST when the United States is under Daylight Savings time from Sun, Mar 8, 2026 to Sun, Nov 1, 2026). 

**This includes a 30 minute UNPAID lunch break, for a total of 40 hours worked per week. You may also take two PAID 10 minute breaks, during your shift.**



To Apply:

To be considered, please submit your resume with a link to a Loom video at the very top of your message.  In the video, please introduce yourself and explain why you’re a great fit for our team, our mission to provide real solutions for our neighbors, and our commitment to making every customer feel valued!

title: AI Operations Specialist
description:
We’re hiring an AI Operations Specialist who can identify practical ways to apply AI across business workflows and turn ideas into execution.



This role is for someone who is proactive, sharp, and comfortable working across different business models, teams, and operational needs. You should be able to understand how AI tools work in real business settings, explain them clearly, and help implement solutions that improve efficiency and results.



This is a fast-paced role with high accountability. You will be expected to take ownership, move quickly, communicate clearly, and follow through without constant oversight.



What You’ll Do



- Review business processes and identify opportunities to apply AI

- Turn AI capabilities into practical business solutions

- Build and improve AI-driven workflows across different use cases

- Test tools, refine outputs, and improve performance over time

- Stay updated on new AI tools, trends, and capabilities

- Explain recommendations clearly to stakeholders and teams

- Manage multiple workflows, projects, or business contexts at once

- Document processes and outcomes for repeatable use

- Continuously improve systems based on feedback and results



What We Need



- 3+ years of experience working across multiple businesses, clients, or industries

- Strong understanding of AI tools and how they are applied in real business environments

- Ability to explain AI concepts clearly in professional English

- Experience turning technical capabilities into business outcomes

- Experience handling multiple workflows or priorities at the same time

- Strong ownership mindset and dependable follow-through

- Excellent communication skills

- Proactive, resourceful, and solution-oriented approach



What Stands Out



- Someone who takes initiative without needing step-by-step direction

- Someone who can think beyond the tool and focus on business value

- Someone who learns quickly and adapts across different industries

- Someone who communicates clearly and pushes ideas forward



Benefits



- Competitive salary

- Monthly profit sharing

- Ongoing upskilling in communication, customer experience, and AI tools
