Tag and hand off warm leads via a Calendar booking or Calednly

Log all activity, replies and call bookings in Kondo or CRM

Send a short end-of-day report with numbers and notes



Success In This Role Looks Like



On a typical week, working 4 hours per day:



Send 100 targeted messages per day

Manage all replies handled within 24 hours

Zero missed or forgotten warm replies

Clean, accurate tracking for every prospect touched via Kondo 

Reliable daily reporting without chasing

Weekly Reporting & Monthly Reporting

Being a part of Dedicated Slack Channels with clients



Requirements



Excellent written English and clear understand of tone of voice

Experience with LinkedIn outreach or B2B lead generation

Comfortable using LinkedIn, Sales Navigator and Google Sheets

High attention to detail, especially with names, companies and tags

Can follow SOPs exactly and improve once you master them

Reliable laptop, strong internet and ability to work consistently and VPN

Minimum 6 months of using LinkedIn

Minimum of 2 years as Appointment Settings/ DMs or Lead Generation



Nice to have:



Experience booking calls for agencies, coaches or B2B services



Hours and Compensation



4 hours per day, 5 days per week



Working hours must overlap at least 2 hours with Central European Time



Starting rate: 3 to 5 USD per hour, depending on experience

Performance-based bonuses for hitting call booking and reply targets

Strong performers will be offered a full-time position



How To Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



Applications that do not follow these steps will NOT be considered.



Use this subject line exactly:



Subject: LINKEDIN VA – [Your Name]



In the
 body, answer these 4 questions in English:



What daily LinkedIn outreach volume have you handled before?

What tools have you used for LinkedIn (for example, Sales Navigator, spreadsheets, CRMs)?

Describe one campaign where your outreach directly led to booked calls or sales.

What hours in your local time can you work consistently?



Attach or link to:

A 2-minute Loom or video introducing yourself and walking through your past LinkedIn outreach experience.

One screenshot of a LinkedIn or DM conversation you handled that led to a call or strong lead (you can blur names).

At the very end of your
, write the word “Dragon” so I know you read everything.



Send your application to: 



Start date ASAP or before January 5th 2026.

title: Drafter
description:
Job Title: Drafter

Company: YU SR STUDIO LLC



Job Summary:

We are seeking a skilled Drafter to join our team. The ideal candidate will be proficient in with basic understanding of , , , and other design software. As a Drafter, you will be responsible for creating detailed drawings and plans based on specifications provided by architects and engineers. Your precision and attention to detail will be crucial in ensuring the accuracy of the designs.



Responsibilities:

- Utilize CAD and REVIT and other design software to create accurate technical drawings.

- Collaborate with principle designer to understand project requirements.

- Develop construction documents from sketches and concept design.

- Ensure that all drawings comply with U.S. industry standards and regulations.

- Make revisions to drawings as necessary based on feedback from tea
mbers.

- Make revisions to drawings as necessary based on comment from different administrative discipline.

- Contribute to the overall success of projects by providing accurate and timely drawings.



Requirements:

- Proven experience as a Drafter or similar role. Internship may be considered.

- Proficiency in and , and other design software.

- Strong understanding of basic of architectural plans.

- Familiarity with creating detailed schematics.

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.

- Strong communication skills to effectively convey technical information.



Join our team as a Drafter and play a key role in bringing innovative designs to life. Show off your expertise in drafting and sense of design while working on exciting projects that push the boundaries of design. Apply now and be part of a dynamic team that values creativity, precision, and collaboration.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume to 







Job Title: ARCHITECTURAL DESIGNER AND SALES ASSOCIATE

Company: YU SR STUDIO LLC



YU SR STUDIO LLC specializing in residential remodeling, additions, and whole house construction & commercial tenant improvement, interior design and construction.

We are looking for an Architectural Designer and Sales Associate who will be responsible for supporting the company's goals to help client with their important assets, provide a timeless and practical design aligning with their vision and budget, and establish and maintain quality relations with new and existing clients, vendors and subcontractors.



We want to meet you if you:

• Are creative, positive, and love design

• Can work independently to get high quality work done.

• Work on a project from design through final construction completion.

• Possess a cooperative, stable, and focused style with high standards.

• Are task-oriented and love supporting people

• Are passionate about making a positive impact

• Are confident working with vendor, architect, or engineer to find better fit solutions

• Are confident working with drafter to give direction, guidance and management.

• Are eager to learn and to advance in your career

• Have exceptional verbal, written, and listening skills

• Have exceptional communication skills that able to transfer ideas into drawings.



You'll want meet us if you are looking for:

• A full time position

• An opportunity to work at a small team

• An opportunity to make significant impact on our client’s assets

• An employer that values employees

• An employer that stakes its reputation on the quality of its work

• A career where you have opportunity to strive and gain experience for your future

• A career where you are appreciated by both employer and clients



Professional requirements include, but not limited to:

• Meet and qualify prospective clients.

• Offer and sell design work to construction and follow the construction to completion.

• Must have excellent CAD skills

• Able to work with other Architectural Software such as Chief Architect, Sketchup, and etc.

• Have experience on project range from bathrooms and kitchen, whole house remodel with addition to shop addition, parking lot design and commercial change of use.



Please send your cover letter, most recent resume, and portfolio. Only qualified applicants will be called for an interview. We would like to fill this position as soon as possible. Compensation will be determined by prior experience and skill sets.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume to

Job Title: Construction Project Coordinator

Company: YU SR STUDIO LLC

Job Summary:

The construction project coordinator coordinates the assigned project activities. They are expected to plan, coordinate, and organize various activities of a construction project and work with various members of the project team and the client to make sure goals are met on time, under the direction of the Project Management Team. This position provides a unique opportunity for the successful candidate to be exposed to and interact with multiple disciplines within company and contracted vendors, such as landscape architects, architects, engineering & design, and contractors.

Key Responsibilities:

- Ability to transfer key information and update to client.

- Ability to coordinate multiple projects simultaneously.

- Early involvement in the preliminary design process of projects to confirm compatibility with project estimates, project timeline & final delivery of approved plan.

- Help maintain project schedules and requirements.

- Ability to prioritize and manage several tasks and work as part of a team or individually as required.

- Readiness to take initiative with a flexible attitude and ability to deal with changes through different project phases.

- Maintaining comprehensive project documentation, including, but not limited to, Engineering Drawings, Architectural Drawings, Permit Processing form and documentation.

- Assist with creating and maintaining schedules (Design and Install schedules) and provide updates accordingly

- Assist in coordinating design conflicts, construction issues and discrepancies.

- Review and coordinate project changes with project stakeholders. Review the schedule and changes impacts with the design team and client.

- Assist in preparing invoice.

- Review drawings before submission (preferred, on-job training will be provided.)

- Set up and maintain all project files once the project has been committed.

- Spot check of third party production documents to ensure compliance.

- Co-chair project start-up and coordination design meetings as required.

- Attend project meetings as requested.

- Plan and execute corrective actions when necessary.

- Oversee and control the architectural drawing submittal/approval process.

- Identify work outside of our scope and track concurrent project progress.

Personal Attributes:

- Strong interpersonal skills to effectively interact with client, consultants, and all levels of the team.

- A strong work ethic, excellent time management skills and motivated to work towards set goals.

- Works well in a team environment

- Excellent communication skills, both oral and written.

- Strong organizational skills and data management.

- Conflict resolution.

- Adaptability.

- Must be able to assess facts and make decisive decisions quickly.

- Demonstrates strong problem-solving skills.

- Must be punctual and have consistent attendance.

- Self-starter who is organized and works efficiently with minimal supervision.

- Has a desire to learn and willing to acquire additional training to become the best for themselves and the company.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume to ----------

title: Certified Public Accountant (CPA) - REMOTE
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embodies Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Certified Public Accountants!



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze, organize, update financial records.

- Perform regular, detailed audits to ensure accuracy in financial documents, expenditures, and investments.

- Perform daily reconciliation of credit card, bank accounts, cash accounts, spending accounts, etc.

- Setup financial accounts as needed.

- Oversee ledger reconciliation and manage accounts payable/receivables.

- Liaise with Tax Accountants to track tax payments and returns.

- Monitor bookkeeping activities regularly.

- Keep company financial information confidential.

- Ensure vendor accounts are kept up to date for the entire organization.

- Inventory Management

- China Purchase Management



Qualifications:

- Excellent FLUENT English verbal and written communication.

- Candidate must possess at least Bachelor’s/College Degree in relevant field.

- Proven work experience as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA).

- Understanding of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP).

- Preferably experienced accounting/finance employees specializing in US Accounting System.

- Familiarity with accounting applications, modules, and financial statements.

- Motivation to exceed expectations while working independently

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Proficient computer skills in Microsoft Office, Outlook, Google, Internet Explorer, Microsoft Teams, etc.



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Sales Representative
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Identify and generate sales leads through prospecting, website inquiries, databases, cold-calling, and other promotional strategies.

- Schedule and conduct virtual meetings and presentations with potential clients.

- Develop and deliver compelling sales presentations on company products and services.

- Maintain accurate records of sales activities, prospects, and customer interactions in the company CRM.

- Track customer reorders and follow up to ensure continued satisfaction.

- Communicate customer and prospect product pain points to appropriate departments.

- Maintain a well-developed pipeline of prospects.

- Collaborate with internal teams to address customer pain points and improve offerings.

- Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers and prospect.

- Consistently meet or exceed sales quotas and performance targets.



Qualifications:

- Fluent in English (both verbal and written) with excellent communication skills.

- Proven success in sales, with a strong track record of meeting or exceeding quotas.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while maintaining high productivity.

- Strong relationship-building and negotiation skills.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Video Editor (Final Cut Pro) – Ongoing Work | Room to Grow
description:
We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented video editor to join our growing media company based in Las Vegas. We specialize in real estate and luxury brand content (watches, lifestyle, etc.), and we need someone who can help us keep up with consistent, high-quality output.



Requirements:

Must use Final Cut Pro

Basic understanding of video editing (cuts, music, simple transitions)

Willing to learn and improve quickly

Able to follow directions and match a specific editing style

Good communication and consistency



What You’ll Be Doing:

Editing short-form content (Instagram Reels, TikToks)

Organizing clips and applying basic and advanced edits

Adding music, captions, transitions, and sound effects

Following templates and workflows we provide



Compensation:

Starting at $75/week

Room to grow quickly based on performance and reliability

Opportunity for more hours, higher pay, and long-term role as we scale





Experience with real estate or product content would be a plus

Familiarity with social media trends

If you’re motivated, consistent, and looking to grow with a fast-moving company, we’d love to work with you.



Please send:

Examples of your work (if available)

Your experience with Final Cut Pro

Your availability per week

title: Long-Form Standard YouTube Editor
description:
We're hiring long-form YouTube video editors for our standard client roster. These are talking-head style videos, educational content, vlogs, and screen recording-based videos. Less motion graphics, more about clean pacing, smart cuts, music selection, and b-roll integration.



You'll be matched with 1-2 dedicated clients and produce 4-8 videos per month.



What You'll Do



Edit 4-8 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-20 minutes)

Follow our established SOPs and editing systems precisely

Deliver clean pacing, structure, music selection, and b-roll integration

Handle talking-head content, screen recordings, and educational formats

Post daily progress updates and manage tasks inside our project management tool

Implement feedback quickly and professionally

Maintain consistent quality across every delivery



What You Need



Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (required)

Basic After Effects skills (nice to have, not required for this tier)

Experience editing YouTube or long-form video content

Strong sense of pacing, music selection, and visual flow

Ability to follow SOPs with precision

Organized file management habits

Basic English proficiency

Reliable internet and editing-capable computer

Consistent availability (part-time or full-time)



Compensation



$150–$250 USD per video (based on length and complexity)

Consistent monthly volume (4-8 videos/month per client)

Performance bonuses tied to channel growth

Paid trial after completing our hiring process

Clear growth path to premium tier ($200-$350/video) as your skills develop

title: Client Success Manager
description:
Client Success Manager (Remote – Full Time | $1,200/month USD)



We are a fast-growing international marketing agency working with fitness and martial arts businesses around the world.



We are looking for a high-level Client Success Manager from the Philippines who can take ownership of client relationships, drive retention, and ensure an exceptional client experience.



This is not an entry-level role — we are looking for someone experienced, proactive, and highly reliable.



?



Your Role



As our Client Success Manager, you will:

 • Manage and nurture client relationships daily

 • Ensure clients are satisfied, retained, and growing

 • Proactively identify issues before they become problems

 • Communicate clearly via
, chat, and video calls

 • Coordinate internally with our team to deliver results

 • Take ownership of client accounts (not wait to be told what to do)

 • Follow up consistently and professionally

 • Help improve systems and processes over time



?



Requirements (MUST HAVE)

 • 5+ years experience in Customer Service, Client Success, or Account Management

 • Excellent spoken and written English (advanced level)

 • Strong communication and relationship-building skills

 • Highly organised and detail-oriented

 • Able to work independently without constant supervision

 • Proactive mindset — you solve problems before being asked

 • Comfortable being responsible for multiple clients at once

 • Stable internet connection and professional remote setup



?



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:

 • Takes ownership and pride in your work

 • Communicates clearly, confidently, and professionally

 • Is calm under pressure and solution-focused

 • Knows when to take initiative and when to ask for help

 • Wants a long-term role and to grow with a company

 • Understands client retention is key to business success



—————



Top Skills Required

 • Excellent client communication and relationship-building skills

 • Proactive problem-solving and ability to work independently

 • Strong focus on client retention and long-term account success





?



Compensation

 • $1,200 USD/month (full-time)

title: Client Success Assistant / Client Success Agent (Remote)
description:

/)

Are you detail-oriented, highly professional, and passionate about helping clients succeed?

If you enjoy communication, analyzing data, and making things run smoothly, we’d love to hear from you!



About the Role:

At Baton, we're looking for a Client Success Assistant / Client Success Agent who will play a key role in making sure our clients stay satisfied and successful.

You will be the primary point of contact for client inquiries, manage critical data analysis, and coordinate communication across internal teams to ensure every client need is handled with speed, care, and precision. You'll also provide important background support to our Client Success department.



What You'll Do:

- Serve as the first point of contact for client inquiries via
, chat, and occasional phone communication.

- Manage and track client issues, questions, and requests to ensure they are resolved quickly and accurately.

- Act as a liaison between clients, Account Managers, and other departments, ensuring aligned and efficient communication.

- Facilitate and document partner and client updates across multiple teams, ensuring consistent and professional follow-through.

- Conduct critical analysis of client data and reporting metrics to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement.

- Support Client Success Managers with administrative and operational tasks, including CRM updates, background research, and reporting.

- Proactively follow up with clients to check satisfaction and uncover additional support needs.

- Collaborate with internal teams to deliver high-quality, timely service.



What We're Looking For:

- Exceptional English communication skills (both written and verbal).

- Professional and neutral English accent.

- Strong English comprehension — you process information quickly and respond thoughtfully.

- Previous experience in client success, customer support, or account management (preferred).

- Strong skills in data analysis — able to interpret numbers, recognize patterns, and make actionable recommendations.

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to prioritize multiple tasks effectively.

- Experience coordinating communication across teams or departments (preferred).

- Proficiency with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred) and communication tools like Intercom, Slack, Zoom.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision and collaborate remotely with a team.

- High attention to detail and commitment to maintaining accuracy.

- Positive, empathetic, and solution-oriented when working with clients.

- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience (preferred).



What We Offer:

- Starting pay of $5.75 USD per hour during the 30-day training period.

- Upon successful training completion and extension of a permanent contract, pay increases to $6.00 USD per hour.

- Eligibility for quarterly performance bonuses tied to role success.

- Annual raises based on performance and tenure.

- A supportive, collaborative team environment where your contributions matter.

- Career growth opportunities in a fast-paced, expanding company.

- Ongoing training and professional development to sharpen your skills.

- Remote work flexibility — work from anywhere!

title: Urgent Hiring: Integration Support Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a Technical Onboarding Specialist with strong communication skills and a solid foundation in automation and CRM integrations. This is not a “button-clicking” role — we need someone who truly understands how systems connect, how data flows, and how to build reliable workflows across different platforms.

If you're a systems thinker who enjoys solving technical problems and guiding non-technical users through integrations, this role is for you.

You’ll support the expansion of our Intake 360 service, which provides on-demand reception and intake for U.S.-based law firms. This role focuses on onboarding clients, gathering requirements, and building integrations that connect our systems with client CRMs.

You must be comfortable communicating through
s and video calls, as this role involves direct interaction with both staff and clients. Strong communication skills are non-negotiable.

Note: Please do not message our pages or contact the CEO directly. All applications will be reviewed only through the instructions provided below.



About the Company

We are a dynamic network of companies, each offering specialized expertise:

Turn Key Ops – We provide top-tier virtual staffing solutions that enable businesses to focus on growth across industries such as medical, real estate, legal, and marketing.

Attorney Assistant – We specialize in virtual assistant services exclusively for law firms, helping them operate more efficiently.

In this role, you’ll support our Intake 360 service, integrating with client CRM systems such as Salesforce, Litify, Lead Docket, HubSpot, and others to enable efficient intake workflows and lead management.



About the Role

Technical Onboarding Specialist – Automation & CRM Integrations

You will be responsible for onboarding new clients, gathering technical requirements, and implementing integrations between internal systems and client CRMs.

This is a client-facing, mid-level technical role. You will work directly with U.S.-based law firms, translate business needs into technical workflows, and ensure accurate and reliable data transfer — including sending data via APIs.

This role is ideal for someone who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and comfortable owning integrations end-to-end.



Core Responsibilities

Lead technical onboarding for new Intake 360 clients

Gather, document, and translate client requirements into integration workflows

Build and maintain automation workflows across various platforms (not limited to any single tool)

Send and receive data between systems using APIs, webhooks, and automation tools

Work closely with Client Success Managers to align technical solutions with client needs

Communicate directly with U.S.-based clients to provide updates, support, and guidance

Troubleshoot and optimize integrations for reliability, scalability, and clean data flow

Standardize integration patterns across multiple CRM systems

Create internal documentation, SOPs, and repeatable onboarding processes

Manage multiple onboarding and integration projects independently

Maintain consistent working hours aligned with U.S. Eastern Time (ET)



Core Qualifications (Must-Have)

Minimum 3 years of experience in automation and system integrations

Strong understanding of how automation works across platforms (not limited to specific tools)

Ability to design workflows that handle real-world business logic and edge cases

Experience working with APIs, webhooks, or data transfer between systems

Strong understanding of data structures and CRM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Lead Docket, etc.)

Ability to troubleshoot integration issues independently and logically

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English

Comfortable working directly with non-technical clients and explaining technical concepts clearly

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

High attention to detail and commitment to clean, maintainable system design



Important: Experience using only entry-level tools such as GoHighLevel (GHL) does not meet the required level for this role unless supported by broader automation and integration experience.



Nice to Have

Experience working with law firms or legal intake systems

Familiarity with CTI/dialer tools (e.g., Regal or similar platforms)

Experience with Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 ecosystems

Prior experience in a remote, client-facing role with U.S.-based teams

Experience building multi-step workflows with conditional logic and error handling

title: Technical Grant Writer
description:
We are looking for a Technical Grant Writer to work with our SR&ED (Scientific Research and Experimental Development) team. 



You are responsible for securing funding by researching, writing, and submitting comprehensive grant proposals. This role supports innovation and growth by obtaining financial support through SR&ED and other grant opportunities, ensuring that the clients' projects and R&D initiatives receive the necessary funding to succeed.



Key responsibilities:-



1. Technical Writing & Proposal Development: Draft, edit, and submit high-quality proposals. Convert complex scientific, clinical, or technical concepts into persuasive narratives.



2. Grant Research & Strategy: Identify and prioritize potential funding opportunities from federal, state, and private foundation sources. Maintain an up-to-date calendar of deadlines.



3. Collaboration with Experts: Work closely with internal team, clients (scientists, engineers etc) and subject matter experts to understand project needs, methodologies, and deliverables.



4. Reporting & Follow-up: Be on top of project deadlines and reportings



Key Requirements:-



1. Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Science or Health



2.  Min. 2 years of experience in technical grant writing with proven successful records. 



3. Ability to interpret and synthesize complex information (e.g., data analysis, scientific literature).



4. Professional command of the English language 



5. Strong analytical, editing, and persuasive writing skills and presentation skills



6. Comfortable in doing presentations and dealing with C-level Executives and Government Bodies



7.  Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite or Google Docs (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), grant management software, task manager software, and CRM databases

Intersection Advisory is a premier USA-based recruiting firm. We help top-tier Financial Advisors transition to massive platforms. We do not micromanage; we measure results. We use the best tech stack in the game: HubSpot, JustCall, ClickSend, and Slack.



The Money (Pay & Perks):

Base Pay: $4.00 USD per hour (Paid Bi-weekly). This is a consistent base salary.



The "Hunter" Bonuses:

$5 per Qualified Lead.

$30 per Held Appointment.



Team bonuses (We can go over in interview)

$1,500 Closed Deal Bonus

$300 Team Bonus



Potential Monthly Income: $800 (Base) + Bonuses = $1,500 - $2,500+



The Mission:

High-Volume Hunting: Execute 200 outbound calls daily using our power dialer.

Precision: Identify qualified financial advisors and book meetings for our Managing Partner.

Speed: Manage leads in HubSpot in real-time.

Communication: Be active on Slack. We work as a unit.

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



English Mastery: You must sound like a US local. Impeccable grammar and tone.

Tech Setup: Wired Internet (Ethernet), Noise Canceling Headset, and a professional home office environment.

Experience: Minimum 2 years in high-volume cold calling (Real Estate, Insurance, or Recruiting).



HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully) To prove you are detail-oriented, follow these exact steps. If you miss one, your application will be deleted immediately.



1. The Subject Line: Solve this math problem: 14 + 13 = ? Write ONLY the number in the subject line of your
.



2. The
 Body:

Attach your Resume (PDF only).

Include a link to a Loom Video (Video is required).



3. The Loom Video Script: Record yourself reading this line with high energy: "Hi, this is [Name] with Intersection Advisory. I'm reaching out because your profile caught our attention regarding the recent shifts at UBS. Do you have 30 seconds?"



Where to Send:
 everything to:

title: Capital Raising & GoHighLevel Assistant
description:
Position: Full-Time Assistant 

Compensation: $7/hr + performance bonuses

Hours: Full-time, long-term role



?



About Us



We are Blades Capital, a real estate investment company based in Wichita, Kansas. Our mission is to transform renters into homeowners through seller-financed housing—while delivering consistent, secured 8–10% returns to private investors.



We’ve closed 300+ transactions, manage $15M+ in assets, and are growing fast. To support this mission, we’re looking for a talented, reliable, and proactive assistant/marketing partner to join us as our right hand.



?



Your Role



You’ll work directly with the founder (Derek Blades) and take ownership of critical tasks across marketing, investor relations, and operations.



Your day-to-day work will include:

 • Watching and applying training (RaiseMasters capital raising system)

 • Assisting in website updates & funnel building (WordPress/ClickFunnels preferred)

 • Helping design ebooks, presentations, and lead magnets

 • Editing and repurposing videos & podcast content

 • Booking podcast appearances and managing outreach to hosts

 • Creating and scheduling
 & SMS drip campaigns

 • Managing social media content & scheduling

 • Assisting with investor communication 
 follow-ups, chat replies, scheduling calls)

 • Supporting general administrative needs



?



Who We’re Looking For



The right person is:

 • Tech-savvy – comfortable with Canva, basic video editing, website builders,
 platforms

 • Creative problem-solver – you don’t just wait for tasks; you anticipate what’s needed

 • Hungry to learn – willing to watch training, master new tools, and grow with us

 • Trustworthy & loyal – looking for a long-term role, not just another gig



?



Requirements

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • Experience in digital marketing (funnels,
, social media, content creation)

 • Familiarity with GoHighLevel

 • Comfortable with Zoom, Google Suite, and project management tools (Trello/Asana)

 • Fast, reliable internet connection

 • Willingness to work U.S. hours 



?



Perks

 • Long-term, stable position with growth potential

 • Training provided (you’ll get access to high-level capital-raising frameworks)

 • Flexible work-from-home setup

 • Opportunity to be part of a mission-driven company helping families and investors



?



How to Apply



Please send:

 1. A short intro video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and why you’d be a great fit

 2. Examples of your design work (ebook, social post, video, or website)

 3. Your resume/CV with relevant experience

title: Cost-Estimator/Project Administrator (Demolition experience desired)
description:
Premium Australian BPO is seeking an experienced Cost-Estimator/Project Administrator for our client, an Australian specialist demolition and civil works company operating across NSW Australia. This client specializes in delivering complex early works, demolition, excavation, civil services and remediation.



This Part-Time (PT) role offers the flexibility to work-from-home (WFH), a market-leading salary package including paid leave + bonuses. Be a key player on a dynamic team supporting tendering, cost-estimating, cost-planning and project administration functions.



Noting this part-time role requires alignment with Australian business hours 9am-1pm AEST Monday through Friday. 



This role is ideal for someone with strong construction estimating fundamentals who understands Australian construction standards and systems and enjoys working closely with project and estimating teams. This role is focused on accuracy, documentation, and internal project support.



****Key Responsibilities Include ****



-Prepare project take-offs and Bills of Quantities (BOQs)



-Utilise established rates for cost-estimating and cost planning



-Support development of early works methodologies for demolition and civil projects



-Assist with tender submission preparation



-Coordinate and review subcontractor pricing



-Support safety systems and documentation



-Work within and support the company’s IMS (Integrated Management System) requirements



-Maintain accurate and well-organised project documentation





*****Required Experience & Skills to apply includes****



- Minimum 4 years proven experience in construction estimating.

- Minimum 2 years proven experience in project administration

- Previous experience with an Australian construction company.

- Previous experience with cost-estimating and construction methodologies for demolition and early civil works. 

- Strong understanding of NSW / Australian construction systems.

- High level of proficiency with Bluebeam software.

- High level of proficiency with Excel and Microsoft Office.

- High level of proficiency with English both verbal and written.

- High level of attention to detail and accuracy.

- Reliable, accountable and deadline oriented.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a dynamic team.

- Comfortable supporting multiple tenders/projects simultaneously.



****WFH Setup**** This role requires candidates have a complete WFH set-up in place including

- Laptop

-Monitor

-Fast and reliable internet

-Back-up internet options

-Back-up power options



****How to Apply**** Please provide the following for your application to be considered



- Your CV

- A brief summary of your experience in construction estimating and project administration.

- A brief summary of your previous Australian experience.



Thank you!

title: Entry-Level Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager (Fresh Graduates, No Experience Required)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a rapidly scaling B2B lead generation agency focused on building and operating outbound sales teams for clients. We specialize in cold calling, powered by strong systems, automation, and AI.



Our campaigns succeed because of tight execution and coordination and that’s exactly where this role makes an impact.



The Opportunity

We’re looking for an Associate Account Manager to help drive the day-to-day execution of client campaigns. In this role, you’ll work closely with internal teams to ensure campaigns are set up correctly, running efficiently, and consistently improving.



This is a great entry point for someone who’s curious about sales, enjoys working with systems, and thrives in a structured, fast-moving environment. Prior experience in account management isn’t required, we’re more interested in how quickly you learn, solve problems, and take initiative.



You’ll be part of the engine that keeps campaigns organized, optimized, and delivering results.



How to Apply

To keep our hiring process fair and consistent, we use an assessment for all applicants.



If you’re interested, complete the assessment and submit your resume, internet speed test result, and audio recording here:





What You’ll Be Working On

- Set up cold calling campaigns (scripts, ICP targeting, contact lists)

- Draft and refine messaging for calls and follow-ups

- Participate in onboarding and weekly client calls; document key takeaways and action items

- Maintain and organize client materials (ICPs, messaging, campaign notes)

- Coordinate with BDRs to ensure campaign alignment and clarity

- Monitor weekly metrics (meetings booked, attendance rates, etc.) and surface issues early

- Assist in preparing client reports and updates

- Leverage AI tools to improve efficiency in writing, summaries, admin tasks

- Troubleshoot issues or set up across tools like Nooks, HubSpot, and similar platforms

- Support the Account Manager with ad hoc tasks to keep campaigns running smoothly



What We’re Looking For

- Strong communication and writing skills

- Genuine interest in sales and outbound strategy

- Comfortable with technology and quick to learn new tools

- Familiar with AI tools like ChatGPT for prompting (or willing to learn quickly)

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Able to follow structured processes while staying adaptable

- Dependable, resourceful, and comfortable coordinating across multiple teams.

- Reliable and comfortable working across teams

-Positive attitude and willingness to grow mindset



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Compensation & Perks

- Monthly pay of USD 1,000 (entry-level role)

- Fully remote setup

- Hands-on training in outbound sales, account management, and AI tools

- Clear progression path: Associate ? Account Manager ? Senior Account Manager

- Opportunities to grow into strategic or client-facing roles

- Work with a fast-growing team in the B2B sales space

- Collaborative and high-performance environment

title: Looking for a person to Register a US LLC Under Their Name | One-Time Fee
description:
Hi,

I've been running a ecommerce business for over 5 years. As part of how I operate, I set up US LLCs — basically US business entities — to keep transactions clean, separated, and easier to manage on the accounting side.

The issue is simple: I've already maxed out the number of companies I can register under my own name, so I'm looking for a trustworthy individual based in the Philippines who would be willing to have one registered under theirs.

What this means for you:



A US LLC gets formed with your name as the registered member

You don't need to do anything operational — no work, no responsibility for day-to-day business

This is a standard, legal business structure used by international e-commerce operators worldwide



What you get:



One-time flat fee

No ongoing obligations



What I'm looking for:



Filipino citizen (PH residency required for this setup)

Willing to provide basic personal info needed for LLC formation

Trustworthy and responsive



If you're interested or have questions, reach out to me directly on

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Content)
description:
The Video Editor will be responsible for creating engaging short-form video content and storytelling optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Meta Ads, and YouTube Shorts. This role focuses on transforming raw footage, creator-style content, and educational wellness material into high-performing social media videos that drive engagement, reach, and conversions.



The ideal candidate understands social media storytelling, current platform trends, and how to structure videos that capture attention within the first few seconds. They should be comfortable editing UGC-style content, founder-led educational videos, and paid advertising creatives while maintaining a clean, calming, and authentic wellness brand aesthetic.



This role also requires the ability to identify trending content formats on TikTok and adapt them for brand use, as well as leverage AI tools to improve editing efficiency and content production workflows.



A test project will be required as part of the interview process.





Responsibilities:

• Short-Form Video Editing

   - Edit engaging short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Meta Ads, and YouTube Shorts

   - Optimize videos with strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

   - Create fast-paced, engaging edits without feeling overly edited

   - Use jump cuts, silence removal, and retention techniques

   - Implement mobile-first editing with captions and visual cues

   - Add light motion graphics and visual enhancements

• Viral Content & Trend Awareness

   - Identify and analyze trending content formats on TikTok and other short-form platforms

   - Adapt viral formats to align with brand messaging

   - Propose new content ideas based on emerging trends

   - Understand patterns that drive engagement, shares, and watch time

• UGC & Authentic Content Editing

   - Edit a variety of creator-style and authentic content, including:

   - Smartphone-shot videos

   - Founder / expert talking-head content

   - Customer testimonials

   - Lifestyle and “day in the life” content

   - Creator-style UGC

• Educational Video Storytelling

   - Structure educational wellness videos using formats such as: Hook, Problem, Quick explanation, Solution or tip, Call to action

• Motion Graphics & Text Overlays

   - Create clean captions optimized for mobile viewing

   - Use kinetic text and key tip callouts

   - Add subtle transitions and engagement indicators

   - Design animated subtitles and highlight boxes

• Brand Aesthetic

   - Maintain a consistent wellness brand look, including: Clean and minimal design, Calm and natural pacing, Soft transitions. Consistent visual style across content

• AI & Workflow Optimization

   - Use AI tools to improve content production efficiency, such as: AI caption generation, AI editing tools, AI clip selection, Content repurposing, Automation for social media workflows





Requirements

• Experience: 

   - 2+ years of experience editing short-form social media content

   - Experience editing for DTC wellness, health, beauty, or supplement brands

   - Strong understanding of social media psychology and content virality

   - Experience editing both paid ads and organic content

• Editing Tools

   - Experience with one or more of the following: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, AI-assisted editing tools

• Ideal Candidate

  We are looking for someone who is: 

   - Highly trend-aware

   - Comfortable working with UGC and imperfect raw footage

   - Creative while able to follow brand guidelines

   - Detail-oriented with strong grammar

   - Able to balance paid ad performance with organic engagement

   - Curious and proactive about new editing tools and AI workflows

   - Able to deliver fast turnaround times





Portfolio Requirements

• Candidates should provide a portfolio that includes:

   - Content for wellness brands (supplements, hormones, gut health, skincare, fitness, etc.)

   - Short-form videos used in social media ads or organic content

   - Examples of UGC-style editing





If you’re interested, please send a copy of your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant work (especially paid ads, UGC content, and ecommerce design).

ssaging platform

title: Wellness Compliance Officer (with USRN / LVP / LVN Certification)
description:
We are hiring a Wellness Compliance Officer to help us out with Compliance needs:



Responsibilities:



Clinical Oversight & Resident Wellness



- Lead virtual clinical oversight of resident wellness programs across multiple communities.

- Monitor resident health status and wellness trends; provide guidance on individualized care protocols.

- Review and support clinical documentation and ensure compliance with care plans and regulatory requirements.

- Act as a clinical resource for community-based teams, residents’ families, and external partners.



Regulatory Compliance & Quality Assurance



- Ensure all wellness-related policies and practices adhere to federal, state, and Assisted Living regulatory standards, including Title 22 requirements.

- Perform regular compliance audits, identify risks, and coordinate corrective action plans.

- Lead preparation and response activities for surveys and regulatory reviews.

- Stay current on changes to healthcare compliance standards and share updates with internal stakeholders.



Education & Staff Support



- Coach and support community clinical staff on compliance, best practices, documentation standards, and resident care expectations.

- Provide remote education on regulatory topics such as HIPAA, safety protocols, and care management processes.



Communication & Collaboration

- Serve as a liaison between clinical and operational teams to promote consistent care delivery and adherence to policies.

- Communicate effectively with leadership, community teams, residents, families, and external providers regarding clinical trends, compliance issues, and care strategies.

- Contribute to interdisciplinary meetings and care review processes. 



Qualifications:



- Active LVN/LPN or RN License in good standing with a U.S. state (compact licensure preferred).

- Proven experience in senior care management — Assisted Living, Skilled Nursing, Home Health, Hospice, or similar continuum.

- Strong understanding of healthcare regulations and compliance requirements, including state-specific Assisted Living regulations and Title 22.

- Ability to interpret clinical documentation and care plans while ensuring compliance with quality standards.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with ability to collaborate effectively in a remote environment.

- Demonstrated leadership, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

- Experience with electronic medical records (EMR/EHR) and data-driven quality improvement.

- Must be amenable to work during Pacific Standard Business hours



to apply kindly use this link:

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant (Part-Time, Growth Potential)

Location: Remote

Hours: 20–25 hours/week to start (with opportunity to grow)

Schedule Requirement: Must be available for 1–2 weekly meetings at 8:30 AM PST



About Us

We are a fast-growing company dedicated to helping health, fitness, and nutrition professionals start and scale successful online businesses.

Our flagship product is a content and meal planning software designed to help coaches create high-quality content for both client success and marketing growth. Through mentorship, tools, and done-for-you resources, we empower coaches to build profitable, impactful businesses.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Executive Assistant who thrives in a dynamic environment.



This role includes a mix of:

- Recurring weekly responsibilities

- Project-based tasks that evolve throughout the year



You’ll play a key role in keeping operations running smoothly while supporting growth initiatives across the business.



Key Responsibilities

- Ongoing Weekly Tasks:

- Inbox management

- Task tracking and project coordination

- Team communication and follow-ups

- Customer service through responses to support tickets

- Assisting with content organization and scheduling (social media,
, replays)

- Supporting client and community experience

- Podcast content review, approval, and scheduling



Project-Based / Variable Tasks:

- Launch support and coordination

- Canva design for workbooks, guides, and client success content

- Content repurposing and organization

- Research and implementation of new tools or systems

- Assisting with course, membership, or product updates

- General “odds and ends” to support business growth



Qualifications



Required:

- Extremely detail-oriented and organized

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and shifting priorities

- Proactive and resourceful mindset

- Availability for 1–2 weekly meetings at 8:30 AM PST

- Experience working as a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant

- Proficiency with:

- Canva and AI tools (ChatGPT, content tools, etc.)



Preferred (Bonus, Not Required):

- Background in nutrition, fitness, or wellness

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms



What We’re Looking For



Someone who:

- Takes initiative to build systems

- Is adaptable and thrives in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment

- Has a genuine interest in health, wellness, and online business

- Wants to grow with a company long-term



How to Apply

We are only accepting applications via
.

- Send your application to: 
 

- Subject Line (required): Application: EA Position



Your application must include:

Video Introduction (required):

Please include a video introducing yourself and covering:

- Whether you have a background in nutrition or fitness

- Your previous experience as a VA or Executive Assistant

- The top skills you would bring to this role

- End your video with: “Thank you for considering my application.”



Supporting Materials:

- Examples of previous work

- Testimonials or references from past EA/VA roles



If you’re someone who loves organization, supporting growth, and being part of a mission-driven business in the wellness space, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Expert Social Media Manager (Remote)
description:
About GlowMD

GlowMD is a fast-growing luxury medical spa in Texas specializing in wellness, aesthetics, IV hydration, and medical weight loss treatments. Our mission is to provide premium, patient-focused care while building a strong and trusted online presence that educates, inspires, and converts potential clients into loyal patients.



We are looking for a creative and marketing-driven Content & Social Media Assistant who understands how to create engaging content that attracts attention, builds trust, and generates leads.



Role Overview

This position is ideal for someone with a social media and digital marketing background who can create compelling content, write engaging captions, and help convert online interest into real patient inquiries.



You will play a key role in building GlowMD’s online presence and supporting our patient acquisition efforts through strategic content and engagement.



Responsibilities

• Content Creation

• Create and post content on Instagram,
, and TikTok

• Write engaging captions designed to educate and convert leads

• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok)

• Design simple graphics or post layouts

• Repurpose content across multiple platforms



Marketing & Lead Generation

• Create content that drives inquiries and bookings

• Write marketing-style captions and strong call-to-actions

• Support promotional campaigns for treatments

• Turn educational posts into lead-generating content



Blog Writing

• Write up to 5 blog posts per week

• Topics include wellness, aesthetics, patient education, and treatments

• Community Engagement

• Respond to DMs, comments, and messages

• Help nurture conversations that may convert to patients

• Support online community engagement



Content Planning

• Assist with weekly content calendars

• Suggest marketing ideas and trending content formats



Future Projects

• Assist with content for courses, webinars, and digital programs



Requirements

• Previous experience in social media management or digital marketing

• Strong writing and marketing copy skills

• Experience creating engaging and persuasive captions

• Basic video editing skills (Reels / TikTok)

• Organized, reliable, and responsive

•  Comfortable working with content schedules and deadlines

• Experience in health, wellness, beauty, or aesthetics is a plus



Compensation

$5.50 per hour

Remote position



Trial Period:

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 5-day paid trial to evaluate content quality, creativity, reliability, and communication.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Consistent content posting

• 5 blog posts per week

• Growth in engagement

• Increased inquiries and leads

• Fast response time to messages



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your resume

• Links to social media accounts you have managed

• Writing or content samples

• A brief explanation of your content creation process



We are looking for someone who understands how to create engaging content that converts interest into real clients. We can't wait to meet you!

title: STR Portfolio Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced Portfolio Manager to oversee the daily operations of a portfolio of short-term rental properties. You will be the central point of coordination between guests, cleaning and maintenance teams, and management. Your mission is to ensure smooth operations, high occupancy, and excellent guest satisfaction while maintaining structured internal processes.



Key Responsibilities



Guest Communication & AI Messaging Oversight



Monitor the AI messaging system and ensure all guest inquiries are handled promptly and professionally



Take ownership of escalations and resolve complex guest issues



Ensure communication standards align with company tone and service levels



Operations Coordination



Coordinate cleaning and maintenance through Breezeway



Dispatch tasks, follow up with field teams, and ensure timely completion



Verify quality control after each intervention



Revenue & Listing Optimization



Optimize occupancy and performance using Hostaway and connected tools



Monitor calendar health, pricing, and availability



Identify opportunities to improve listing performance and guest experience



Process & Team Collaboration



Work closely with management to implement and improve operational processes



Act as a bridge between guest services, maintenance, and leadership



Contribute ideas to scale operations efficiently



Reputation Management



Ensure every stay meets quality standards to secure positive reviews



Proactively address guest concerns before they escalate



Monitor feedback and implement corrective actions



Documentation & Reporting



Log all tasks and communications in the company system



Maintain accurate records of actions taken across the portfolio



Provide regular updates to management on performance and issues



Requirements



Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role (STR portfolio management, property management, hospitality operations)



Experience with Hostaway, Breezeway, Guesty, or similar platforms



Strong customer service and conflict-resolution skills



Excellent written communication (English required, French an asset)



Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple properties simultaneously



Problem-solver with a proactive mindset



Comfortable working in a fast-paced, tech-driven environment



What We Offer



Competitive salary based on experience



Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling company



Dynamic and entrepreneurial environment



Flexible work structure



Access to industry-leading tools and training



How to Apply

Send your CV and a short message explaining your relevant experience in short-term rentals and property operations.



Join us in building one of Montréal’s leading corporate stay operators!

title: CRM & Automation Specialist (Go High Level)
description:
CRM & Automation Specialist (Go High Level) – Multi-Location Med Spa and hotel business 



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Type: Full-Time

Compensation: $1,500/month



About the Role



We are a fast-growing multi-location medical aesthetics company seeking a CRM & Automation Specialist to build and manage scalable systems inside Go High Level (GHL). We have a digital team compromised of over twenty of the most talented marketing professionals across the Philippines. 



Our focus is on building trackable systems that drive revenue across multiple locations — not just basic CRM setups.



You will be responsible for creating infrastructure that supports:



Multiple locations



Multiple sales reps



Multiple active ad campaigns



All while ensuring no lead is lost, ignored, or forgotten.



Responsibilities



Build and manage Go High Level (GHL) across multiple clinic locations



Design and implement:



Lead pipelines



Multi-location workflows



SMS/email automation systems



Structure systems to handle:



Multiple sales reps



Multiple inbound lead sources (ads, organic, referrals)



Ensure:



Fast lead response times



Proper lead routing and assignment



Ongoing follow-up and reactivation



Build systems to:



Nurture cold and old leads



Prevent leads from slipping through the cracks



Integrate GHL with:



Phone systems (RingCentral or similar)



EMR systems (via Zapier, API, or webhooks)



Create reporting dashboards for:



Lead tracking



Conversion rates



Appointment booking performance



Requirements



Proven experience with Go High Level (GHL)



Experience building systems for multi-location businesses



Strong understanding of:



Lead routing and assignment logic



Automation and workflow design



SMS/email conversion strategies



Experience with integrations (Zapier, APIs, webhooks)



Highly detail-oriented and execution-focused



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



To apply, please submit:



Your resume



A short list of Go High Level systems you have personally built, including:



Type of business (med spa, real estate, dental, etc.)



What you built (pipelines, automations, integrations, etc.)



Answer the following question:



How would you set up a CRM system for a 10-location medical aesthetics company with multiple sales reps and multiple active ad campaigns, to ensure:



All incoming leads are properly routed and followed up with



Leads are nurtured over time



No old or cold leads are lost or forgotten



Performance is trackable across locations and campaigns



(Be specific. We are looking for real system design, not general answers.)



What We’re Looking For



Someone who can design and build scalable systems, not just basic setups



Someone who understands lead flow, conversion, and follow-up deeply



Someone who can think through multi-location complexity



Fast, reliable, and able to execute independently

title: Creative Director – AI-Driven Ads
description:
???? About the Role

We’re looking for a Creative Director who lives and breathes ideas — someone who understands how to turn attention into action through storytelling, hooks, and powerful visuals.



You’ll be leading creative direction for our real estate and Airbnb education campaigns, helping us produce scroll-stopping ads that inspire people to learn how to build cash flow using creative real estate strategies.



Your role will be to brainstorm, strategize, and direct the production of high-converting ad creatives — using AI tools, competitor research, and creative experimentation.



If you’re the kind of person who loves to say, 'Let’s try this angle…' and thrives in a high-speed, testing-driven marketing environment, this is your dream role.

???? Key Responsibilities

- Lead creative direction for ad campaigns across
, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok

- Develop unique hooks, scripts, and storyboards for video ads targeting real estate and Airbnb audiences

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, etc.) to brainstorm, write, and design ad ideas

- Research and model top-performing competitor ads, then test multiple creative iterations daily

- Direct designers and editors to ensure ad visuals match marketing angles

- Constantly analyze ad performance, iterate quickly, and double down on winners

- Keep a pulse on market trends, viral formats, and what’s working in short-form video

- Collaborate with marketing and media buying teams to align creative strategy with data insights

???? Tools & Skills You’ll Use

- ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity – for copy and idea generation

- Midjourney / Leonardo / Runway / Pika Labs – for AI visual and video creation

- CapCut / After Effects / Premiere Pro – for video editing and storyboarding

- Canva / Photoshop / Figma – for ad design mockups

- Meta Ads Library, TikTok Creative Center – for competitor and trend research

- Google Drive, Slack, Notion, Sheets – for collaboration and tracking

???? Ideal Candidate Traits

- Creative thinker who’s not afraid to test bold ideas

- Understands marketing psychology and how to craft attention-grabbing hooks

- Knows how to analyze ad performance and optimize creatives

- Passion for AI tools and staying on the cutting edge of creative tech

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, testing-heavy environment

- Experience in real estate, finance, or education-based marketing (preferred)

- Can produce or direct multiple ad concepts per day

- Excited to bring imagination + structure to a creative process that drives measurable results

???? Compensation & Perks

- Base Pay: Competitive (depending on experience)

- Bonuses & Incentives: Based on ad performance (CPA, CTR, ROAS improvements)

- Schedule: Flexible hours (EST overlap preferred)

- Payments: Bi-weekly via Wise or PayPal

- Long-term opportunity to lead a creative team as we scale

- Access to AI tools, mentorship, and ad spend data for testing and experimentation

- Freedom to experiment, fail fast, and innovate

???? How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself and your creative philosophy

2. A link to your portfolio or previous ad creatives (especially video ads)

3. A short breakdown of how you approach creating hooks or ad angles

4. List AI tools you’ve used for creative work (visuals, scripts, editing, etc.)

5. Optional: Include an example of a real estate or education ad you admire and why it works

???? Questions

1. What AI tools have you used for ad creation or creative ideation?

2. How do you come up with and validate hooks for paid ads?

3. What’s your process for modeling competitor ads and making them original?

4. How many ad variations do you think should be tested weekly?

5. Do you have experience working in real estate, education, or online marketing industries?

6. What’s your favorite current ad format or style on TikTok or Meta?

7. Why do you think you’re a strong fit for a creative leadership role like this?

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant (Guest Management + Operations + Tech & AI Tools Expert)
description:
???? About the Role

We’re looking for a smart, tech-savvy, and reliable Airbnb Virtual Assistant to help manage multiple short-term rental properties. This role combines guest management, cleaner coordination, calendar control, operations oversight, and automation management — all while using AI tools to improve efficiency.



This is a mostly passive role — you won’t be working nonstop throughout the day, but you must remain available and responsive to guests, cleaners, and management during your shift. During certain times, you’ll handle active tasks such as confirming cleanings, managing stock orders, or adjusting automations.

???? Responsibilities

Guest & Booking Management:

- Respond quickly and professionally to guest messages (via Airbnb app or desktop)

- Send check-in instructions, access codes, and digital house manuals

- Handle guest issues calmly and coordinate with cleaners or maintenance as needed

- Manage all property calendars across Airbnb, VRBO, and 

- Request 5-star reviews and manage public review responses

Operations, Cleaners & Calendar Management:

- Oversee cleaning schedules — assign, confirm, and track cleanings for each property

- Maintain cleaning and laundry logs, including payments and confirmations

- Monitor and manage the Airbnb calendar to prevent double-bookings

- Track maintenance and repairs, coordinating with appropriate service providers

- Order and restock supplies (toiletries, linens, kitchen essentials) when inventory runs low

- Maintain and update property operations dashboard

Tech, AI & Automation Management:

- Use ChatGPT or other AI tools to generate message templates, reports, and follow-ups

- Manage and optimize automations inside Hospitable, Zapier, or GoHighLevel

- Set up workflows for guest messages, cleaner notifications, and internal alerts

- Maintain Google Sheets or Notion dashboards for reports and automated summaries

- Research and recommend new AI tools to improve communication, operations, and efficiency

Admin & Reporting:

- Maintain occupancy, revenue, and expense reports

- Generate weekly summaries with key insights

- Track cleaning payments, restock expenses, and operational costs

- Assist with refining internal SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

???? Availability & Schedule

• Must be available between 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM EST (Eastern Standard Time)

• Majority of hours are passive availability (you won’t always be actively working but must remain reachable)

• Some active work periods required (cleaning coordination, reporting, updates)

• Weekend availability required (guest check-ins/check-outs, cleaning follow-ups)

• Must stay responsive via phone or messaging apps during assigned hours

? Requirements

• 1–2 years of experience managing Airbnb or short-term rentals (VA or co-host preferred)

• Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Reliable high-speed internet and backup data plan

• Tech-savvy and comfortable using AI and automation tools

• Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

• Calm, professional, and dependable under pressure

• Capable of multitasking across guest messages, cleaner coordination, and reports

???? Tools You’ll Use (or Learn Quickly)

Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Hospitable, Guesty, Hostaway, ChatGPT, Zapier, GoHighLevel, Pricelabs, Google Sheets, Notion, Slack

???? Compensation & Perks

• $600/month, paid bi-weekly and prorated

• Mostly passive work — minimal active hours but high responsiveness required

• Performance bonuses for guest satisfaction and reliability

• Paid training on new tools and automation systems

• Long-term opportunity with potential to grow into Operations Manager

• Supportive team, flexible hours, and streamlined systems

???? How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 1–2 minute video introduction about yourself and your experience

2. A short overview of your Airbnb or hospitality VA background

3. Tell us about an AI or tech tool you’ve used to improve your workflow

4. Describe how you handled a guest issue or emergency successfully

???? Questions

1. What is your internet speed, and do you have a backup connection?

2. Have you managed Airbnb properties before? If yes, how many?

3. Are you available between 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM EST, including weekends?

4. How comfortable are you using Airbnb, ChatGPT, and Google Sheets?

5. How do you typically handle guest complaints or last-minute problems?

6. What apps or tools do you use to stay responsive while working remotely?

7. How do you stay organized managing multiple properties, cleaners, and calendars?

8. Why do you believe you’re a great fit for this role?

title: Online Bookkeeper
description:
>>>>>>>>We're looking for an Amazing Online Bookkeeper



About Us:

Action Auto Utah is a rapidly growing used car dealership with multiple locations in Utah. We provide comprehensive car care services, financing, and nationwide delivery. We are expanding our online team and looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Online Bookkeeper to join us.

We are seeking an experienced Online Bookkeeper to handle financial record-keeping and reporting for our company. The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with accuracy and confidentiality.

-Assist the Accounting team with audits, reconciliations, and financial reporting

???? How to Apply:

title: IT Support Engineer (MSP)
description:
IT Support Engineer (MSP) – Remote | Ownership, Not Tickets



Location: Remote

Type: Part-time (20 hours/week to start) with potential to grow to full-time

Hours: 10am–2pm UK

Pay: £6 per hour



About the Role:

This isn’t a typical IT support position. You won’t be stuck in a helpdesk queue, passing tickets, or limited to a narrow task list. Instead, you’ll take full ownership of multiple IT environments, solving problems end-to-end and proactively improving systems. We’re looking for someone who asks, “How can this be better?” rather than “That’s not my job.”



Key Responsibilities:

Administer, troubleshoot, and optimize Microsoft 365 (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, Entra ID)

Support Windows desktops and basic server environments

Manage networking tasks: DNS, DHCP, VPNs, Wi-Fi, and firewalls

Implement cybersecurity improvements and best practices

Assist with onboarding new users and migrations

Communicate directly with users in plain English, not IT jargon

Proactively review systems, identify gaps, and improve environments even when things are quiet



What We’re Looking For:

A well-rounded IT professional comfortable across the full IT stack

Someone who solves problems fully and takes ownership until resolved

Strong understanding that security is part of everything

Ability to work independently, troubleshoot complex issues, and figure things out

Proactive mindset during downtime; reviewing, optimizing, and improving systems



Required Skills & Experience:

Previous experience in IT support or MSP environments

Strong Microsoft 365 knowledge (essential)

Experience with Entra ID & Intune

Solid Windows desktop and basic server support

Strong networking fundamentals

Excellent problem-solving and communication skills with non-technical users



Nice-to-Have (Bonuses):

Google Workspace experience

macOS knowledge

Cybersecurity frameworks (e.g., Cyber Essentials)

Backup and disaster recovery experience

RMM/PSA tool experience



Hours & Growth:

Start with 20 hours per week (10am–2pm UK)

Opportunity to increase to full-time as the role grows

Long-term role with strong progression potential



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Modern, serviceable computer (e.g., Windows 11, i5+, 16GB RAM minimum)

Stable, high-speed internet connection

Secure, dedicated workspace

Applicants must provide PC specs and an internet speed screenshot



Why You’ll Love This Role:

Varied and challenging work; no two days are the same

Real autonomy and ownership

Opportunity to impact IT systems directly and improve efficiency

Exposure to business decisions and technology projects

A role where your input matters, not just following scripts



What This Role Isn’t:

Not a call center

Not a “stick to your lane” job

Not a role where you hide behind tickets



How to Apply:

Use “Vixa Hire” in the subject line of your application.

Send your resume and cover letter.

Include your internet speed test result and a screenshot of your laptop specs.

We look forward to receiving your application.
